7458:   App.renderTraceReport=function(){var type=this._traceReport||'full',q=(this._traceReportSearch||'').toLocaleLowerCase('sq-AL'),title='',heads=[],rows=[];function match(a){return !q||a.join(' 7438:   App.attachProcessLot=function(i){var input=document.getElementById('batch-lot-'+i);if(!input||input.dataset.attached)return;input.dataset.attached='1';var lots=this.data.lots.filter(T.isSaleableLot);SAC.attach(input.parentElement,{data:lots,fields:['lotNumber','productName','supplierName','locationText'],display:function(x){return x.lotNumber;},render:function(x){return '<div class="sac-code">'+App.esc(x.lotNumber)+'</div><div class="sac-sub">'+App.esc(x.productName)+' · '+App.fmtKg(x.quantityAvailable)+' '+App.esc(x.baseUnit||'')+' · '+App.esc(x.locationText||'')+'</div>';},onSelect:function(x){App._processInputs[i]={id:App._processInputs[i].id,lotId:x.id,lotNumber:x.lotNumber,productId:x.productId,productName:x.productName,quantity:App._processInputs[i].quantity||0};App.renderProcessInputs();App.processCalc();},showAllOnFocus:true});input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input'));};
7439:   App.processCalc=function(){var input=this._processInputs.reduce(function(s,x){return s+num(x.quantity);},0),out=num(value('batch-output')),waste=num(value('batch-waste')),loss=input-out-waste,y=input>0?out/input*100:0;var e=document.getElementById('batch-calc');if(e)e.innerHTML='<div class="wf-calc-row"><span>Hyrje totale:</span><strong>'+this.fmtKg(input)+' kg</strong></div><div class="wf-calc-row"><span>Dalje:</span><strong>'+this.fmtKg(out)+' kg</strong></div><div class="wf-calc-row"><span>Mbetje:</span><strong>'+this.fmtKg(waste)+' kg</strong></div><div class="wf-calc-row"><span>Humbje procesi:</span><strong class="'+(loss<0?'text-danger':'')+'">'+this.fmtKg(loss)+' kg</strong></div><div class="wf-calc-row total"><span>Rendimenti:</span><strong>'+this.fmt(y)+'%</strong></div>';};

1811:       // Atomic reversal of all effects

1915:     if (!invoice) throw new Error('Fatura e shitjes nuk u gjet');
1916:     if (invoice.status === 'POSTED') throw new Error('Kjo faturë është tashmë e regjistruar.');
1917:     if (invoice.status === 'CANCELLED') throw new Error('Fatura e anulluar nuk mund të regjistrohet.');

1919:     if(await DB.get('postingKeys',postingKey)) throw new Error('Kjo faturë është tashmë e regjistruar.');
1920:     const totals=C.calcInvoiceTotals(invoice.lines||[]), customer=await DB.get('customers',invoice.customerId);

1940:   // PAYMENT RECORDING
1941:   // ================================================================
1942:   async function recordPayment(partnerType, partnerId, invoiceId, amount, method, requestKey) {
1943:     const amt=C.round2(C.toNum(amount)); if(amt<=0) throw new Error('Shuma e pagesës duhet > 0');
1944:     if(partnerType!=='supplier'&&partnerType!=='customer') throw new Error('Lloji i partnerit nuk është i vlefshëm');
1945:     const invoiceStore=partnerType==='supplier'?'purchaseInvoices':'salesInvoices', ledgerStore=partnerType==='supplier'?'supplierLedger':'customerLedger', partnerStore=partnerType==='supplier'?'suppliers':'customers';
1946:     const invoice=await DB.get(invoiceStore,invoiceId); if(!invoice||invoice.status!=='POSTED') throw new Error('Fatura e regjistruar nuk u gjet');
1947:     const payableTotal=C.round2(invoice.netAfterCredits!=null?C.toNum(invoice.netAfterCredits):C.toNum(invoice.totalAmount));
1948:     const remaining=C.round2(payableTotal-C.toNum(invoice.paidAmount));
1949:     if(remaining<=0) throw new Error('Fatura është paguar plotësisht');
1950:     if(amt>remaining+0.005) throw new Error('Pagesa tejkalon shumën e mbetur: '+remaining);
1951:     const entries=await DB.getByIndex(ledgerStore,'invoiceId',invoiceId), charge=entries.find(function(e){return e.entryType==='CHARGE';}); if(!charge) throw new Error('Nuk u gjet detyrimi');
1952:     const partner=await DB.get(partnerStore,partnerId); if(!partner) throw new Error('Partneri nuk u gjet');
1953:     const normalizedRequestKey=String(requestKey||'').trim();
1954:     const postingKey=normalizedRequestKey?'PAYMENT:'+normalizedRequestKey:'';
1955:     if(postingKey&&await DB.get('postingKeys',postingKey)) throw new Error('Kjo pagesë është regjistruar më parë.');
1956:     const now=new Date().toISOString(), currentActor=actor(), payment={id:DB.genId('pay'),partnerType:partnerType,partnerId:partnerId,invoiceId:invoiceId,amount:amt,method:method||'cash',requestKey:normalizedRequestKey,date:now,timestamp:now,createdBy:currentActor.username,createdByName:currentActor.displayName};
1957:     const txStores=['payments',ledgerStore,partnerStore,invoiceStore,'auditLogs'];if(postingKey)txStores.push('postingKeys');
1958:     await DB.atomicTx(txStores,'readwrite',function(stores){
1959:       stores.payments.put(payment);
1960:       charge.paidAmount=C.round2(C.toNum(charge.paidAmount)+amt);
1961:       const invoicePaid=C.round2(C.toNum(invoice.paidAmount)+amt), invoiceRemaining=C.round2(Math.max(0,payableTotal-invoicePaid));
1962:       charge.balance=invoiceRemaining;charge.status=invoiceRemaining===0?'PAID':'PARTIALLY_PAID';stores[ledgerStore].put(charge);
1963:       partner.balance=C.round2(C.toNum(partner.balance)-amt);partner.updatedAt=now;stores[partnerStore].put(partner);
1964:       invoice.paidAmount=invoicePaid;invoice.remainingAmount=invoiceRemaining;invoice.paymentStatus=invoiceRemaining===0?'PAID':'PARTIALLY_PAID';invoice.updatedAt=now;stores[invoiceStore].put(invoice);
1965:       if(postingKey)stores.postingKeys.put({id:postingKey,documentId:invoiceId,paymentId:payment.id,type:'PAYMENT_POST',createdAt:now});
1966:       stores.auditLogs.put(C.auditEntry('payment',payment.id,'RECORD',null,payment,invoiceId));
1967:     }); return payment;
1968:   }

1971:     saveWeightForm: saveWeightForm,
1972:     registerPurchase: registerPurchase,
1973:     cancelPurchase: cancelPurchase,
1974:     saveSalesInvoice: saveSalesInvoice,
1975:     registerSale: registerSale,
1976:     recordPayment: recordPayment
1977:   };
1978: })(window);

1933:       allocations.forEach(function(a){var lot=lotMap[a.lotId];lot.quantityAvailable=C.round3(global.Traceability.lotAvailable(lot)-a.quantity);lot.quantityConsumed=C.round3(C.toNum(lot.quantityConsumed)+a.quantity);lot.status=lot.quantityAvailable<=0.0001?'DEPLETED':'AVAILABLE';lot.updatedAt=now;stores.lots.put(lot);stores.lotMovements.put({id:DB.genId('lm'),lotId:lot.id,lotNumber:lot.lotNumber,productId:a.productId,movementType:'SALE_OUT',quantity:-a.quantity,balanceAfter:lot.quantityAvailable,sourceDocType:'salesInvoice',sourceDocId:invoice.id,sourceDocNumber:invoice.docNumber,customerId:invoice.customerId,customerName:invoice.customerName,warehouseId:invoice.warehouseId,timestamp:now,createdBy:actor().username});});
1934:       stores.customerLedger.put({id:DB.genId('cl'),customerId:invoice.customerId,invoiceId:invoice.id,docNumber:invoice.docNumber,entryType:'CHARGE',amount:totals.totalAmount,paidAmount:0,balance:totals.totalAmount,date:invoice.date,dueDate:invoice.dueDate,status:'UNPAID',timestamp:now});customer.totalSales=C.round2(C.toNum(customer.totalSales)+totals.totalAmount);customer.balance=C.round2(C.toNum(customer.balance)+totals.totalAmount);customer.updatedAt=now;stores.customers.put(customer);stores.postingKeys.put({id:postingKey,documentId:invoice.id,type:'SALE_POST',createdAt:now});stores.auditLogs.put(C.auditEntry('salesInvoice',invoice.id,'REGISTER_ATOMIC',null,invoice,invoice.docNumber));
1935:     });
1936:     return invoice;
1937:   }

1939:   // ================================================================
1940:   // PAYMENT RECORDING
1941:   // ================================================================
1942:   async function recordPayment(partnerType, partnerId, invoiceId, amount, method, requestKey) {
1943:     const amt=C.round2(C.toNum(amount)); if(amt<=0) throw new Error('Shuma e pagesës duhet > 0');
1944:     if(partnerType!=='supplier'&&partnerType!=='customer') throw new Error('Lloji i partnerit nuk është i vlefshëm');
1945:     const invoiceStore=partnerType==='supplier'?'purchaseInvoices':'salesInvoices', ledgerStore=partnerType==='supplier'?'supplierLedger':'customerLedger', partnerStore=partnerType==='supplier'?'suppliers':'customers';
1946:     const invoice=await DB.get(invoiceStore,invoiceId); if(!invoice||invoice.status!=='POSTED') throw new Error('Fatura e regjistruar nuk u gjet');
1947:     const payableTotal=C.round2(invoice.netAfterCredits!=null?C.toNum(invoice.netAfterCredits):C.toNum(invoice.totalAmount));
1948:     const remaining=C.round2(payableTotal-C.toNum(invoice.paidAmount));
1949:     if(remaining<=0) throw new Error('Fatura është paguar plotësisht');
1950:     if(amt>remaining+0.005) throw new Error('Pagesa tejkalon shumën e mbetur: '+remaining);
1951:     const entries=await DB.getByIndex(ledgerStore,'invoiceId',invoiceId), charge=entries.find(function(e){return e.entryType==='CHARGE';}); if(!charge) throw new Error('Nuk u gjet detyrimi');
1952:     const partner=await DB.get(partnerStore,partnerId); if(!partner) throw new Error('Partneri nuk u gjet');
1953:     const normalizedRequestKey=String(requestKey||'').trim();
1954:     const postingKey=normalizedRequestKey?'PAYMENT:'+normalizedRequestKey:'';
1955:     if(postingKey&&await DB.get('postingKeys',postingKey)) throw new Error('Kjo pagesë është regjistruar më parë.');
1956:     const now=new Date().toISOString(), currentActor=actor(), payment={id:DB.genId('pay'),partnerType:partnerType,partnerId:partnerId,invoiceId:invoiceId,amount:amt,method:method||'cash',requestKey:normalizedRequestKey,date:now,timestamp:now,createdBy:currentActor.username,createdByName:currentActor.displayName};
1957:     const txStores=['payments',ledgerStore,partnerStore,invoiceStore,'auditLogs'];if(postingKey)txStores.push('postingKeys');
1958:     await DB.atomicTx(txStores,'readwrite',function(stores){
1959:       stores.payments.put(payment);
1960:       charge.paidAmount=C.round2(C.toNum(charge.paidAmount)+amt);
1961:       const invoicePaid=C.round2(C.toNum(invoice.paidAmount)+amt), invoiceRemaining=C.round2(Math.max(0,payableTotal-invoicePaid));
1962:       charge.balance=invoiceRemaining;charge.status=invoiceRemaining===0?'PAID':'PARTIALLY_PAID';stores[ledgerStore].put(charge);
1963:       partner.balance=C.round2(C.toNum(partner.balance)-amt);partner.updatedAt=now;stores[partnerStore].put(partner);
1964:       invoice.paidAmount=invoicePaid;invoice.remainingAmount=invoiceRemaining;invoice.paymentStatus=invoiceRemaining===0?'PAID':'PARTIALLY_PAID';invoice.updatedAt=now;stores[invoiceStore].put(invoice);
1965:       if(postingKey)stores.postingKeys.put({id:postingKey,documentId:invoiceId,paymentId:payment.id,type:'PAYMENT_POST',createdAt:now});
1966:       stores.auditLogs.put(C.auditEntry('payment',payment.id,'RECORD',null,payment,invoiceId));
1967:     }); return payment;
1968:   }

1972:     registerPurchase: registerPurchase,
1973:     cancelPurchase: cancelPurchase,
1974:     saveSalesInvoice: saveSalesInvoice,
1975:     registerSale: registerSale,
1976:     recordPayment: recordPayment
1977:   };
1978: })(window);

7437:   App.renderProcessInputs=function(){var body=document.getElementById('batch-inputs');if(!body)return;body.innerHTML=this._processInputs.map(function(x,i){var lot=byId(App.data.lots,x.lotId)||{};return '<tr><td>'+(i+1)+'</td><td><div class="sac"><input id="batch-lot-'+i+'" class="sac-input" value="'+App.esc(x.lotNumber||'')+'" placeholder="Kërko lot…" onfocus="App.attachProcessLot('+i+')"><div class="sac-results"></div></div></td><td class="text-right">'+App.fmtKg(lot.quantityAvailable||0)+'</td><td><input type="number" step="0.001" value="'+num(x.quantity)+'" oninput="App._processInputs['+i+'].quantity=parseFloat(this.value)||0;App.processCalc()"></td><td><button class="btn btn-red btn-sm" onclick="App._processInputs.splice('+i+',1);App.renderProcessInputs();App.processCalc()">×</button></td></tr>';}).join('');};

7439:   App.processCalc=function(){var input=this._processInputs.reduce(function(s,x){return s+num(x.quantity);},0),out=num(value('batch-output')),waste=num(value('batch-waste')),loss=input-out-waste,y=input>0?out/input*100:0;var e=document.getElementById('batch-calc');if(e)e.innerHTML='<div class="wf-calc-row"><span>Hyrje totale:</span><strong>'+this.fmtKg(input)+' kg</strong></div><div class="wf-calc-row"><span>Dalje:</span><strong>'+this.fmtKg(out)+' kg</strong></div><div class="wf-calc-row"><span>Mbetje:</span><strong>'+this.fmtKg(waste)+' kg</strong></div><div class="wf-calc-row"><span>Humbje procesi:</span><strong class="'+(loss<0?'text-danger':'')+'">'+this.fmtKg(loss)+' kg</strong></div><div class="wf-calc-row total"><span>Rendimenti:</span><strong>'+this.fmt(y)+'%</strong></div>';};

7439:   App.processCalc=function(){var input=this._processInputs.reduce(function(s,x){return s+num(x.quantity);},0),out=num(value('batch-output')),waste=num(value('batch-waste')),loss=input-out-waste,y=input>0?out/input*100:0;var e=document.getElementById('batch-calc');if(e)e.innerHTML='<div class="wf-calc-row"><span>Hyrje totale:</span><strong>'+this.fmtKg(input)+' kg</strong></div><div class="wf-calc-row"><span>Dalje:</span><strong>'+this.fmtKg(out)+' kg</strong></div><div class="wf-calc-row"><span>Mbetje:</span><strong>'+this.fmtKg(waste)+' kg</strong></div><div class="wf-calc-row"><span>Humbje procesi:</span><strong class="'+(loss<0?'text-danger':'')+'">'+this.fmtKg(loss)+' kg</strong></div><div class="wf-calc-row total"><span>Rendimenti:</span><strong>'+this.fmt(y)+'%</strong></div>';};

3475: /* ===== finance.js ===== */
3476: /**
3477:  * Sistemi Genit 6.2 — Cash and Bank domain service.
3478:  * All posted financial documents use atomic IndexedDB transactions.
3479:  * Balances are derived from posted movements; account.balance is only a cached projection.
3480:  */
3481: (function (global) {
3482:   'use strict';
3483:   var C = global.Calc;
3484: 
3485:   function num(v) { return C.toNum(v); }
3486:   function money(v) { return C.round2(num(v)); }
3487:   function nowIso() { return new Date().toISOString(); }
3488:   function actor() {
3489:     var u = global.Auth && global.Auth.getCurrentUser ? global.Auth.getCurrentUser() : null;
3490:     return { username: u ? u.username : 'system', displayName: u ? (u.displayName || u.username) : 'System' };
3491:   }
3492:   function clone(x) { return x ? JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(x)) : x; }
3493:   function requireRecord(record, message) { if (!record) throw new Error(message); return record; }
3494:   function positiveAmount(v) { var x = money(v); if (x <= 0) throw new Error('Shuma duhet të jetë më e madhe se zero.'); return x; }
3495:   function defaultCompanyId() { return (global.App && global.App.activeCompanyId) || 'company_default'; }
3496:   function settingsFinance(settings) {
3497:     var row = (settings || []).find(function (x) { return x.key === 'finance'; }) || {};
3498:     return { allowNegativeCash: !!row.allowNegativeCash, allowNegativeBank: row.allowNegativeBank !== false };
3499:   }
3500:   function nextNumber(prefix, rows, field, companyCode) {
3501:     var year = new Date().getFullYear();
3502:     var head = prefix + '-' + year + '-';
3503:     var max = 0;
3504:     (rows || []).forEach(function (row) {
3505:       var value = String(row[field || 'docNumber'] || '');
3506:       if (companyCode && value.indexOf(prefix + '-' + companyCode + '-' + year + '-') === 0) {
3507:         max = Math.max(max, parseInt(value.split('-').pop(), 10) || 0);
3508:       } else if (!companyCode && value.indexOf(head) === 0) {
3509:         max = Math.max(max, parseInt(value.split('-').pop(), 10) || 0);
3510:       }
3511:     });
3512:     return companyCode ? prefix + '-' + companyCode + '-' + year + '-' + String(max + 1).padStart(6, '0') : head + String(max + 1).padStart(6, '0');
3513:   }
3514:   function movementBalance(opening, rows, accountKey, accountId) {
3515:     return money(num(opening) + (rows || []).filter(function (m) {
3516:       return m[accountKey] === accountId && m.status === 'POSTED';
3517:     }).reduce(function (sum, m) {
3518:       return sum + (m.direction === 'IN' ? num(m.amount) : -num(m.amount));
3519:     }, 0));
3520:   }

7437:   App.renderProcessInputs=function(){var body=document.getElementById('batch-inputs');if(!body)return;body.innerHTML=this._processInputs.map(function(x,i){var lot=byId(App.data.lots,x.lotId)||{};return '<tr><td>'+(i+1)+'</td><td><div class="sac"><input id="batch-lot-'+i+'" class="sac-input" value="'+App.esc(x.lotNumber||'')+'" placeholder="Kërko lot…" onfocus="App.attachProcessLot('+i+')"><div class="sac-results"></div></div></td><td class="text-right">'+App.fmtKg(lot.quantityAvailable||0)+'</td><td><input type="number" step="0.001" value="'+num(x.quantity)+'" oninput="App._processInputs['+i+'].quantity=parseFloat(this.value)||0;App.processCalc()"></td><td><button class="btn btn-red btn-sm" onclick="App._processInputs.splice('+i+',1);App.renderProcessInputs();App.processCalc()">×</button></td></tr>';}).join('');};
7438:   App.attachProcessLot=function(i){var input=document.getElementById('batch-lot-'+i);if(!input||input.dataset.attached)return;input.dataset.attached='1';var lots=this.data.lots.filter(T.isSaleableLot);SAC.attach(input.parentElement,{data:lots,fields:['lotNumber','productName','supplierName','locationText'],display:function(x){return x.lotNumber;},render:function(x){return '<div class="sac-code">'+App.esc(x.lotNumber)+'</div><div class="sac-sub">'+App.esc(x.productName)+' · '+App.fmtKg(x.quantityAvailable)+' '+App.esc(x.baseUnit||'')+' · '+App.esc(x.locationText||'')+'</div>';},onSelect:function(x){App._processInputs[i]={id:App._processInputs[i].id,lotId:x.id,lotNumber:x.lotNumber,productId:x.productId,productName:x.productName,quantity:App._processInputs[i].quantity||0};App.renderProcessInputs();App.processCalc();},showAllOnFocus:true});input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input'));};
7439:   App.processCalc=function(){var input=this._processInputs.reduce(function(s,x){return s+num(x.quantity);},0),out=num(value('batch-output')),waste=num(value('batch-waste')),loss=input-out-waste,y=input>0?out/input*100:0;var e=document.getElementById('batch-calc');if(e)e.innerHTML='<div class="wf-calc-row"><span>Hyrje totale:</span><strong>'+this.fmtKg(input)+' kg</strong></div><div class="wf-calc-row"><span>Dalje:</span><strong>'+this.fmtKg(out)+' kg</strong></div><div class="wf-calc-row"><span>Mbetje:</span><strong>'+this.fmtKg(waste)+' kg</strong></div><div class="wf-calc-row"><span>Humbje procesi:</span><strong class="'+(loss<0?'text-danger':'')+'">'+this.fmtKg(loss)+' kg</strong></div><div class="wf-calc-row total"><span>Rendimenti:</span><strong>'+this.fmt(y)+'%</strong></div>';};

7438:   App.attachProcessLot=function(i){var input=document.getElementById('batch-lot-'+i);if(!input||input.dataset.attached)return;input.dataset.attached='1';var lots=this.data.lots.filter(T.isSaleableLot);SAC.attach(input.parentElement,{data:lots,fields:['lotNumber','productName','supplierName','locationText'],display:function(x){return x.lotNumber;},render:function(x){return '<div class="sac-code">'+App.esc(x.lotNumber)+'</div><div class="sac-sub">'+App.esc(x.productName)+' · '+App.fmtKg(x.quantityAvailable)+' '+App.esc(x.baseUnit||'')+' · '+App.esc(x.locationText||'')+'</div>';},onSelect:function(x){App._processInputs[i]={id:App._processInputs[i].id,lotId:x.id,lotNumber:x.lotNumber,productId:x.productId,productName:x.productName,quantity:App._processInputs[i].quantity||0};App.renderProcessInputs();App.processCalc();},showAllOnFocus:true});input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input'));};
7439:   App.processCalc=function(){var input=this._processInputs.reduce(function(s,x){return s+num(x.quantity);},0),out=num(value('batch-output')),waste=num(value('batch-waste')),loss=input-out-waste,y=input>0?out/input*100:0;var e=document.getElementById('batch-calc');if(e)e.innerHTML='<div class="wf-calc-row"><span>Hyrje totale:</span><strong>'+this.fmtKg(input)+' kg</strong></div><div class="wf-calc-row"><span>Dalje:</span><strong>'+this.fmtKg(out)+' kg</strong></div><div class="wf-calc-row"><span>Mbetje:</span><strong>'+this.fmtKg(waste)+' kg</strong></div><div class="wf-calc-row"><span>Humbje procesi:</span><strong class="'+(loss<0?'text-danger':'')+'">'+this.fmtKg(loss)+' kg</strong></div><div class="wf-calc-row total"><span>Rendimenti:</span><strong>'+this.fmt(y)+'%</strong></div>';};

3475: /* ===== finance.js ===== */
3476: /**
3477:  * Sistemi Genit 6.2 — Cash and Bank domain service.
3478:  * All posted financial documents use atomic IndexedDB transactions.
3479:  * Balances are derived from posted movements; account.balance is only a cached projection.
3480:  */
3481: (function (global) {
3482:   'use strict';
3483:   var C = global.Calc;
3484: 
3485:   function num(v) { return C.toNum(v); }
3486:   function money(v) { return C.round2(num(v)); }
3487:   function nowIso() { return new Date().toISOString(); }
3488:   function actor() {
3489:     var u = global.Auth && global.Auth.getCurrentUser ? global.Auth.getCurrentUser() : null;
3490:     return { username: u ? u.username : 'system', displayName: u ? (u.displayName || u.username) : 'System' };
3491:   }
3492:   function clone(x) { return x ? JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(x)) : x; }
3493:   function requireRecord(record, message) { if (!record) throw new Error(message); return record; }
3494:   function positiveAmount(v) { var x = money(v); if (x <= 0) throw new Error('Shuma duhet të jetë më e madhe se zero.'); return x; }
3495:   function defaultCompanyId() { return (global.App && global.App.activeCompanyId) || 'company_default'; }
3496:   function settingsFinance(settings) {
3497:     var row = (settings || []).find(function (x) { return x.key === 'finance'; }) || {};
3498:     return { allowNegativeCash: !!row.allowNegativeCash, allowNegativeBank: row.allowNegativeBank !== false };
3499:   }
3500:   function nextNumber(prefix, rows, field, companyCode) {
3501:     var year = new Date().getFullYear();
3502:     var head = prefix + '-' + year + '-';
3503:     var max = 0;
3504:     (rows || []).forEach(function (row) {
3505:       var value = String(row[field || 'docNumber'] || '');
3506:       if (companyCode && value.indexOf(prefix + '-' + companyCode + '-' + year + '-') === 0) {
3507:         max = Math.max(max, parseInt(value.split('-').pop(), 10) || 0);
3508:       } else if (!companyCode && value.indexOf(head) === 0) {
3509:         max = Math.max(max, parseInt(value.split('-').pop(), 10) || 0);
3510:       }
3511:     });
3512:     return companyCode ? prefix + '-' + companyCode + '-' + year + '-' + String(max + 1).padStart(6, '0') : head + String(max + 1).padStart(6, '0');
3513:   }
3514:   function movementBalance(opening, rows, accountKey, accountId) {
3515:     return money(num(opening) + (rows || []).filter(function (m) {
3516:       return m[accountKey] === accountId && m.status === 'POSTED';
3517:     }).reduce(function (sum, m) {
3518:       return sum + (m.direction === 'IN' ? num(m.amount) : -num(m.amount));
3519:     }, 0));
3520:   }

514:   // Business stores are isolated by the active company. Security/system stores stay global.
515:   const COMPANY_SCOPED_STORES = new Set([
516:     'documentLinks','traceFarms','traceParcels','traceFieldActivities','lots','processBatches','processBatchInputs','lotMovements',
517:     'traceQualityChecks','traceRecallCases','traceRecallItems','products','suppliers','customers','warehouses','units','categories',

526:   let _activeCompanyId = '';

528:   function setCompanyContext(companyId) { _activeCompanyId = String(companyId || '').trim(); }
529:   function getCompanyContext() { return _activeCompanyId; }
530:   function applyCompanyScope(storeName, record) {
531:     if (!record || typeof record !== 'object' || !COMPANY_SCOPED_STORES.has(storeName)) return record;
532:     if (!_activeCompanyId) return record;
533:     if (!record.companyId) record.companyId = _activeCompanyId;
534:     return record;
535:   }
536:   function inCompanyScope(storeName, record) {
537:     if (!COMPANY_SCOPED_STORES.has(storeName) || !_activeCompanyId) return true;
538:     return !record || !record.companyId || record.companyId === _activeCompanyId;
539:   }

3214:   async function saveProcessBatch(input) {
3215:     requirePermission('documents.create');
3216:     input = input || {};
3217:     if (!input.outputProductId) throw new Error('Produkti përfundimtar është i detyrueshëm.');
3218:     if (!input.warehouseId) throw new Error('Magazina është e detyrueshme.');
3219:     if (num(input.outputQuantity) <= 0) throw new Error('Sasia e prodhuar duhet të jetë më e madhe se zero.');
3220:     var validInputs = (input.inputs || []).filter(function (x) { return x.lotId && num(x.quantity) > 0; });
3221:     if (!validInputs.length) throw new Error('Zgjidh të paktën një lot hyrës.');
3222:     var inputTotal = round3(validInputs.reduce(function (s, x) { return s + num(x.quantity); }, 0));
3223:     var wasteQty = round3(num(input.wasteQuantity));
3224:     var processLoss = round3(inputTotal - num(input.outputQuantity) - wasteQty);
3225:     if (processLoss < -0.001) throw new Error('Dalja + mbetjet nuk mund të tejkalojnë hyrjen totale.');
3226:     var existing = input.id ? await DB.get('processBatches', input.id) : null;
3227:     if (existing && existing.status !== 'DRAFT') throw new Error('Procesi i postuar/anulluar nuk mund të editohet.');
3228:     var all = await DB.getAll('processBatches');
3229:     var id = input.id || DB.genId('batch');
3230:     var oldInputs = existing ? await DB.getByIndex('processBatchInputs', 'batchId', id) : [];
3231:     var now = nowIso();
3232:     var rec = Object.assign({}, existing || {}, input, {
3233:       id: id, batchNumber: existing && existing.batchNumber || input.batchNumber || nextBatchNumber(all, input.date || now), status: 'DRAFT',
3234:       date: input.date || now, processType: input.processType || 'PACKAGING', outputQuantity: round3(input.outputQuantity), inputQuantity: inputTotal,
3235:       wasteQuantity: wasteQty, processLossQuantity: Math.max(0, processLoss), yieldPct: inputTotal > 0 ? round2(num(input.outputQuantity) / inputTotal * 100) : 0,
3236:       qualityStatus: input.qualityStatus || 'APPROVED', createdAt: existing && existing.createdAt || now, updatedAt: now,
3237:       createdBy: existing && existing.createdBy || actor().username, updatedBy: actor().username
3238:     });
3239:     var lines = validInputs.map(function (x, idx) {
3240:       return { id: x.id || DB.genId('binput'), batchId: id, seq: idx + 1, lotId: x.lotId, lotNumber: x.lotNumber || '', productId: x.productId || '', productName: x.productName || '', quantity: round3(x.quantity), createdAt: x.createdAt || now, updatedAt: now };
3241:     });
3242:     await DB.atomicTx(['processBatches', 'processBatchInputs', 'auditLogs'], 'readwrite', function (stores) {
3243:       stores.processBatches.put(rec); oldInputs.forEach(function (x) { stores.processBatchInputs.delete(x.id); }); lines.forEach(function (x) { stores.processBatchInputs.put(x); });
3244:       stores.auditLogs.put(C.auditEntry('processBatch', rec.id, existing ? 'UPDATE' : 'CREATE', existing, rec, rec.batchNumber));
3245:     });
3246:     rec.inputs = lines; return rec;
3247:   }

3249:   async function postProcessBatch(batchId) {
3250:     requirePermission('documents.post');
3251:     var batch = await DB.get('processBatches', batchId);
3252:     if (!batch) throw new Error('Procesi nuk u gjet.');
3253:     if (batch.status === 'POSTED') throw new Error('Procesi është tashmë i postuar.');
3254:     if (batch.status === 'CANCELLED') throw new Error('Procesi i anulluar nuk mund të postohet.');
3255:     var postingKey = 'PROCESS_POST:' + batch.id;
3256:     if (await DB.get('postingKeys', postingKey)) throw new Error('Procesi është tashmë i postuar.');
3257:     var inputs = await DB.getByIndex('processBatchInputs', 'batchId', batch.id);
3258:     if (!inputs.length) throw new Error('Procesi nuk ka lote hyrëse.');
3259:     var outputProduct = await DB.get('products', batch.outputProductId);
3260:     if (!outputProduct) throw new Error('Produkti përfundimtar nuk u gjet.');
3261:     var inputLots = {}, inputProducts = {}, totalInputCost = 0;
3262:     for (var i = 0; i < inputs.length; i++) {
3263:       var lot = await DB.get('lots', inputs[i].lotId);
3264:       if (!isSaleableLot(lot)) throw new Error('Loti hyrës nuk është i disponueshëm/aprovuar: ' + (inputs[i].lotNumber || inputs[i].lotId));
3265:       if (lotAvailable(lot) + 0.0001 < num(inputs[i].quantity)) throw new Error('Loti ' + lot.lotNumber + ' nuk ka sasi të mjaftueshme.');
3266:       var p = await DB.get('products', lot.productId);
3267:       if (!p || num(p.stock) + 0.0001 < num(inputs[i].quantity)) throw new Error('Stoku i artikullit ' + (p && p.name || lot.productName) + ' nuk lejon procesin.');
3268:       inputLots[lot.id] = lot; inputProducts[p.id] = p; totalInputCost += num(inputs[i].quantity) * num(p.avgPrice || p.lastPrice);
3269:     }
3270:     var allLots = await DB.getAll('lots');
3271:     var outputNumber = batch.outputLotNumber || nextNumber(allLots, outputLotBase(outputProduct, batch.date), 'lotNumber', 3);
3272:     var outputLotId = DB.genId('lot'), outputQty = round3(batch.outputQuantity), now = nowIso(), before = clone(batch);
3273:     var outputUnitCost = outputQty > 0 ? round2((totalInputCost + num(batch.extraCost)) / outputQty) : 0;
3274:     var oldOutputStock = num(outputProduct.stock), newOutputStock = round3(oldOutputStock + outputQty);
3275:     var newOutputAvg = C.calcWeightedAvgPrice(oldOutputStock, num(outputProduct.avgPrice), outputQty, outputUnitCost);
3276:     await DB.atomicTx(['processBatches', 'processBatchInputs', 'lots', 'lotMovements', 'products', 'stockMovements', 'productCards', 'priceHistory', 'postingKeys', 'auditLogs'], 'readwrite', function (stores) {
3277:       inputs.forEach(function (line) {
3278:         var lot = inputLots[line.lotId], p = inputProducts[lot.productId], qty = round3(line.quantity);
3279:         lot.quantityAvailable = round3(lotAvailable(lot) - qty); lot.quantityConsumed = round3(num(lot.quantityConsumed) + qty); lot.status = lot.quantityAvailable <= 0.0001 ? 'DEPLETED' : 'AVAILABLE'; lot.updatedAt = now; stores.lots.put(lot);
3280:         p.stock = round3(num(p.stock) - qty); p.updatedAt = now; stores.products.put(p);
3281:         stores.lotMovements.put({ id: DB.genId('lm'), lotId: lot.id, lotNumber: lot.lotNumber, productId: lot.productId, movementType: 'PROCESS_CONSUME', quantity: -qty, balanceAfter: lot.quantityAvailable, sourceDocType: 'processBatch', sourceDocId: batch.id, sourceDocNumber: batch.batchNumber, batchId: batch.id, warehouseId: batch.warehouseId, timestamp: now, createdBy: actor().username });
3282:         stores.stockMovements.put({ id: DB.genId('sm'), productId: lot.productId, warehouseId: batch.warehouseId, movementType: 'OUT_PROCESS', sourceDocType: 'processBatch', sourceDocId: batch.id, sourceDocNumber: batch.batchNumber, quantity: -qty, baseUnitQuantity: -qty, unit: p.baseUnit || lot.baseUnit, value: -round2(qty * num(p.avgPrice)), timestamp: now, lotId: lot.id, lotNumber: lot.lotNumber });
3283:         stores.productCards.put({ id: DB.genId('pc'), productId: lot.productId, sourceDocId: batch.id, sourceDocNumber: batch.batchNumber, type: 'PROCESS_CONSUME', date: batch.date, quantityIn: 0, quantityOut: qty, balance: p.stock, value: -round2(qty * num(p.avgPrice)), timestamp: now, lotId: lot.id, lotNumber: lot.lotNumber });
3284:       });
3285:       outputProduct.stock = newOutputStock; outputProduct.avgPrice = newOutputAvg; outputProduct.lastPrice = outputUnitCost; outputProduct.updatedAt = now; stores.products.put(outputProduct);
3286:       var outputStatus = batch.qualityStatus === 'APPROVED' ? 'AVAILABLE' : (batch.qualityStatus === 'REJECTED' ? 'BLOCKED' : 'QUARANTINE');
3287:       var outputLot = { id: outputLotId, lotNumber: outputNumber, lotType: batch.processType === 'PACKAGING' ? 3249:   async function postProcessBatch(batchId) {
3250:     requirePermission('documents.post');
3251:     var batch = await DB.get('processBatches', batchId);
3252:     if (!batch) throw new Error('Procesi nuk u gjet.');
3253:     if (batch.status === 'POSTED') throw new Error('Procesi është tashmë i postuar.');

3256:     if (await DB.get('postingKeys', postingKey)) throw new Error('Procesi është tashmë i postuar.');

3258:     if (!inputs.length) throw new Error('Procesi nuk ka lote hyrëse.');
3259:     var outputProduct = await DB.get('products', batch.outputProductId);
3260:     if (!outputProduct) throw new Error('Produkti përfundimtar nuk u gjet.');
3261:     var inputLots = {}, inputProducts = {}, totalInputCost = 0;
3262:     for (var i = 0; i < inputs.length; i++) {
3263:       var lot = await DB.get('lots', inputs[i].lotId);
3264:       if (!isSaleableLot(lot)) throw new Error('Loti hyrës nuk është i disponueshëm/aprovuar: ' + (inputs[i].lotNumber || inputs[i].lotId));
3265:       if (lotAvailable(lot) + 0.0001 < num(inputs[i].quantity)) throw new Error('Loti ' + lot.lotNumber + ' nuk ka sasi të mjaftueshme.');
3266:       var p = await DB.get('products', lot.productId);
3267:       if (!p || num(p.stock) + 0.0001 < num(inputs[i].quantity)) throw new Error('Stoku i artikullit ' + (p && p.name || lot.productName) + ' nuk lejon procesin.');
3268:       inputLots[lot.id] = lot; inputProducts[p.id] = p; totalInputCost += num(inputs[i].quantity) * num(p.avgPrice || p.lastPrice);
3269:     }

3271:     var outputNumber = batch.outputLotNumber || nextNumber(allLots, outputLotBase(outputProduct, batch.date), 'lotNumber', 3);
3272:     var outputLotId = DB.genId('lot'), outputQty = round3(batch.outputQuantity), now = nowIso(), before = clone(batch);
3273:     var outputUnitCost = outputQty > 0 ? round2((totalInputCost + num(batch.extraCost)) / outputQty) : 0;
3274:     var oldOutputStock = num(outputProduct.stock), newOutputStock = round3(oldOutputStock + outputQty);
3275:     var newOutputAvg = C.calcWeightedAvgPrice(oldOutputStock, num(outputProduct.avgPrice), outputQty, outputUnitCost);

3334:   async function traceLot(lotId) {
3335:     var lots = await DB.getAll('lots'), lotMap = {}; lots.forEach(function (x) { lotMap[x.id] = x; });
3336:     var batches = await DB.getAll('processBatches'), inputs = await DB.getAll('processBatchInputs'), allMoves = await DB.getAll('lotMovements');
3337:     var lot = lotMap[lotId]; if (!lot) throw new Error('Loti nuk u gjet.');
3338:     function ancestors(id, seen) { seen = seen || {}; if (seen[id]) return []; seen[id] = true; var l = lotMap[id], out = []; if (l && l.outputBatchId) { inputs.filter(function (x) { return x.batchId === l.outputBatchId; }).forEach(function (x) { var il = lotMap[x.lotId]; if (il) { out.push(il); out = out.concat(ancestors(il.id, seen)); } }); } return out; }
3339:     function descendants(id, seen) { seen = seen || {}; if (seen[id]) return []; seen[id] = true; var out = []; inputs.filter(function (x) { return x.lotId === id; }).forEach(function (x) { var b = batches.find(function (y) { return y.id === x.batchId; }), ol = b && lotMap[b.outputLotId]; if (ol) { out.push(ol); out = out.concat(descendants(ol.id, seen)); } }); return out; }
3340:     var ancestorLots = ancestors(lotId), descendantLots = descendants(lotId), chainIds = [lotId].concat(descendantLots.map(function (x) { return x.id; }));
3341:     var sales = allMoves.filter(function (x) { return chainIds.indexOf(x.lotId) >= 0 && x.movementType === 'SALE_OUT'; });
3342:     var qualityChecks = (await DB.getAll('traceQualityChecks')).filter(function (x) { return x.lotId === lotId || chainIds.indexOf(x.lotId) >= 0; });
3343:     var recallCases = (await DB.getAll('traceRecallCases')).filter(function (x) { return x.lotId === lotId || chainIds.indexOf(x.lotId) >= 0; });
3344:     return { lot: lot, ancestors: ancestorLots, descendants: descendantLots, movements: allMoves.filter(function (x) { return x.lotId === lotId; }).sort(function (a, b) { return new Date(a.timestamp) - new Date(b.timestamp); }), sales: sales, batches: batches, inputs: inputs, lots: lots, qualityChecks: qualityChecks, recallCases: recallCases };
3345:   }

7194:   App.captureGps = function (prefix) {
7195:     if (!navigator.geolocation) { this.toast('Pajisja/browser-i nuk ofron GPS. Plotëso koordinatat manualisht.', 'error'); return; }
7196:     var btn = document.getElementById(prefix + '-gps-btn');
7197:     if (btn) { btn.disabled = true; btn.textContent = 'Duke marrë GPS…'; }
7198:     navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(function (p) {
7199:       var pairs = { latitude: p.coords.latitude, longitude: p.coords.longitude, altitude: p.coords.altitude == null ? '' : p.coords.altitude, accuracy: p.coords.accuracy };
7200:       Object.keys(pairs).forEach(function (k) { var e = document.getElementById(prefix + '-' + k); if (e) e.value = pairs[k]; });
7201:       var map = document.getElementById(prefix + '-map');
7202:       if (map) { map.href = T.mapUrl(p.coords.latitude, p.coords.longitude); map.style.display = 'inline-flex'; }
7203:       App.toast('Lokacioni GPS u regjistrua.');
7204:       if (btn) { btn.disabled = false; btn.textContent = '📍 Merr GPS'; }
7205:     }, function (e) {
7206:       if (btn) { btn.disabled = false; btn.textContent = '📍 Merr GPS'; }
7207:       App.toast('GPS nuk u mor: ' + (e.message || 'leja u refuzua') + '. Mund ta plotësosh manualisht.', 'error');
7208:     }, { enableHighAccuracy: true, timeout: 15000, maximumAge: 0 });
7209:   };

7194:   App.captureGps = function (prefix) {
7195:     if (!navigator.geolocation) { this.toast('Pajisja/browser-i nuk ofron GPS. Plotëso koordinatat manualisht.', 'error'); return; }
7196:     var btn = document.getElementById(prefix + '-gps-btn');
7197:     if (btn) { btn.disabled = true; btn.textContent = 'Duke marrë GPS…'; }
7198:     navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(function (p) {
7199:       var pairs = { latitude: p.coords.latitude, longitude: p.coords.longitude, altitude: p.coords.altitude == null ? '' : p.coords.altitude, accuracy: p.coords.accuracy };
7200:       Object.keys(pairs).forEach(function (k) { var e = document.getElementById(prefix + '-' + k); if (e) e.value = pairs[k]; });
7201:       var map = document.getElementById(prefix + '-map');
7202:       if (map) { map.href = T.mapUrl(p.coords.latitude, p.coords.longitude); map.style.display = 'inline-flex'; }
7203:       App.toast('Lokacioni GPS u regjistrua.');
7204:       if (btn) { btn.disabled = false; btn.textContent = '📍 Merr GPS'; }
7205:     }, function (e) {
7206:       if (btn) { btn.disabled = false; btn.textContent = '📍 Merr GPS'; }
7207:       App.toast('GPS nuk u mor: ' + (e.message || 'leja u refuzua') + '. Mund ta plotësosh manualisht.', 'error');
7208:     }, { enableHighAccuracy: true, timeout: 15000, maximumAge: 0 });
7209:   };

500: /* ===== db.js ===== */
501: /**
502:  * Sistemi Genit — IndexedDB Database Layer
503:  * Schema versioning, migrations, atomic transactions, CRUD operations.
504:  * The UI is NEVER the source of truth — all authoritative data lives here.
505:  */
506: (function (global) {
507:   'use strict';
508: 
509:   const DB_NAME = 'SistemiGenitDB';
510:   const DB_VERSION = 9;
511: 
512: 
513: 
514:   // Business stores are isolated by the active company. Security/system stores stay global.
515:   const COMPANY_SCOPED_STORES = new Set([
516:     'documentLinks','traceFarms','traceParcels','traceFieldActivities','lots','processBatches','processBatchInputs','lotMovements',
517:     'traceQualityChecks','traceRecallCases','traceRecallItems','products','suppliers','customers','warehouses','units','categories',
518:     'weightForms','weightFormLines','purchaseInvoices','purchaseItems','salesInvoices','salesItems','stockMovements','supplierLedger',
519:     'customerLedger','productCards','priceHistory','purchaseRFQs','purchaseRFQItems','purchaseOrders','purchaseOrderItems',
520:     'purchaseReceipts','purchaseReceiptItems','purchaseReturns','purchaseReturnItems','supplierCreditNotes','supplierCreditNoteItems',
521:     'agents','salesQuotations','salesQuotationItems','salesOrders','salesOrderItems','deliveryNotes','deliveryNoteItems','creditNotes',
522:     'creditNoteItems','postingKeys','payments','cashAccounts','cashDocuments','cashMovements','cashClosings','cashClosingDenominations',
523:     'bankAccounts','bankTransactions','bankStatements','bankStatementLines','bankReconciliations','accountTransfers','paymentAllocations',
524:     'documentSequences','auditLogs'
525:   ]);
526:   let _activeCompanyId = '';
527: 
528:   function setCompanyContext(companyId) { _activeCompanyId = String(companyId || '').trim(); }
529:   function getCompanyContext() { return _activeCompanyId; }
530:   function applyCompanyScope(storeName, record) {
531:     if (!record || typeof record !== 'object' || !COMPANY_SCOPED_STORES.has(storeName)) return record;
532:     if (!_activeCompanyId) return record;
533:     if (!record.companyId) record.companyId = _activeCompanyId;
534:     return record;

1942:   async function recordPayment(partnerType, partnerId, invoiceId, amount, method, requestKey) {
1943:     const amt=C.round2(C.toNum(amount)); if(amt<=0) throw new Error('Shuma e pagesës duhet > 0');
1944:     if(partnerType!=='supplier'&&partnerType!=='customer') throw new Error('Lloji i partnerit nuk është i vlefshëm');
1945:     const invoiceStore=partnerType==='supplier'?'purchaseInvoices':'salesInvoices', ledgerStore=partnerType==='supplier'?'supplierLedger':'customerLedger', partnerStore=partnerType==='supplier'?'suppliers':'customers';
1946:     const invoice=await DB.get(invoiceStore,invoiceId); if(!invoice||invoice.status!=='POSTED') throw new Error('Fatura e regjistruar nuk u gjet');
1947:     const payableTotal=C.round2(invoice.netAfterCredits!=null?C.toNum(invoice.netAfterCredits):C.toNum(invoice.totalAmount));
1948:     const remaining=C.round2(payableTotal-C.toNum(invoice.paidAmount));
1949:     if(remaining<=0) throw new Error('Fatura është paguar plotësisht');
1950:     if(amt>remaining+0.005) throw new Error('Pagesa tejkalon shumën e mbetur: '+remaining);
1951:     const entries=await DB.getByIndex(ledgerStore,'invoiceId',invoiceId), charge=entries.find(function(e){return e.entryType==='CHARGE';}); if(!charge) throw new Error('Nuk u gjet detyrimi');
1952:     const partner=await DB.get(partnerStore,partnerId); if(!partner) throw new Error('Partneri nuk u gjet');
1953:     const normalizedRequestKey=String(requestKey||'').trim();
1954:     const postingKey=normalizedRequestKey?'PAYMENT:'+normalizedRequestKey:'';
1955:     if(postingKey&&await DB.get('postingKeys',postingKey)) throw new Error('Kjo pagesë është regjistruar më parë.');
1956:     const now=new Date().toISOString(), currentActor=actor(), payment={id:DB.genId('pay'),partnerType:partnerType,partnerId:partnerId,invoiceId:invoiceId,amount:amt,method:method||'cash',requestKey:normalizedRequestKey,date:now,timestamp:now,createdBy:currentActor.username,createdByName:currentActor.displayName};
1957:     const txStores=['payments',ledgerStore,partnerStore,invoiceStore,'auditLogs'];if(postingKey)txStores.push('postingKeys');
1958:     await DB.atomicTx(txStores,'readwrite',function(stores){
1959:       stores.payments.put(payment);
1960:       charge.paidAmount=C.round2(C.toNum(charge.paidAmount)+amt);
1961:       const invoicePaid=C.round2(C.toNum(invoice.paidAmount)+amt), invoiceRemaining=C.round2(Math.max(0,payableTotal-invoicePaid));
1962:       charge.balance=invoiceRemaining;charge.status=invoiceRemaining===0?'PAID':'PARTIALLY_PAID';stores[ledgerStore].put(charge);
1963:       partner.balance=C.round2(C.toNum(partner.balance)-amt);partner.updatedAt=now;stores[partnerStore].put(partner);
1964:       invoice.paidAmount=invoicePaid;invoice.remainingAmount=invoiceRemaining;invoice.paymentStatus=invoiceRemaining===0?'PAID':'PARTIALLY_PAID';invoice.updatedAt=now;stores[invoiceStore].put(invoice);
1965:       if(postingKey)stores.postingKeys.put({id:postingKey,documentId:invoiceId,paymentId:payment.id,type:'PAYMENT_POST',createdAt:now});
1966:       stores.auditLogs.put(C.auditEntry('payment',payment.id,'RECORD',null,payment,invoiceId));
1967:     }); return payment;
1968:   }

1934:       stores.customerLedger.put({id:DB.genId('cl'),customerId:invoice.customerId,invoiceId:invoice.id,docNumber:invoice.docNumber,entryType:'CHARGE',amount:totals.totalAmount,paidAmount:0,balance:totals.totalAmount,date:invoice.date,dueDate:invoice.dueDate,status:'UNPAID',timestamp:now});customer.totalSales=C.round2(C.toNum(customer.totalSales)+totals.totalAmount);customer.balance=C.round2(C.toNum(customer.balance)+totals.totalAmount);customer.updatedAt=now;stores.customers.put(customer);stores.postingKeys.put({id:postingKey,documentId:invoice.id,type:'SALE_POST',createdAt:now});stores.auditLogs.put(C.auditEntry('salesInvoice',invoice.id,'REGISTER_ATOMIC',null,invoice,invoice.docNumber));

1937:   }
1938: 
1939:   // ================================================================
1940:   // PAYMENT RECORDING
1941:   // ================================================================
1942:   async function recordPayment(partnerType, partnerId, invoiceId, amount, method, requestKey) {
1943:     const amt=C.round2(C.toNum(amount)); if(amt<=0) throw new Error('Shuma e pagesës duhet > 0');
1944:     if(partnerType!=='supplier'&&partnerType!=='customer') throw new Error('Lloji i partnerit nuk është i vlefshëm');
1945:     const invoiceStore=partnerType==='supplier'?'purchaseInvoices':'salesInvoices', ledgerStore=partnerType==='supplier'?'supplierLedger':'customerLedger', partnerStore=partnerType==='supplier'?'suppliers':'customers';
1946:     const invoice=await DB.get(invoiceStore,invoiceId); if(!invoice||invoice.status!=='POSTED') throw new Error('Fatura e regjistruar nuk u gjet');
1947:     const payableTotal=C.round2(invoice.netAfterCredits!=null?C.toNum(invoice.netAfterCredits):C.toNum(invoice.totalAmount));
1948:     const remaining=C.round2(payableTotal-C.toNum(invoice.paidAmount));
1949:     if(remaining<=0) throw new Error('Fatura është paguar plotësisht');
1950:     if(amt>remaining+0.005) throw new Error('Pagesa tejkalon shumën e mbetur: '+remaining);
1951:     const entries=await DB.getByIndex(ledgerStore,'invoiceId',invoiceId), charge=entries.find(function(e){return e.entryType==='CHARGE';}); if(!charge) throw new Error('Nuk u gjet detyrimi');
1952:     const partner=await DB.get(partnerStore,partnerId); if(!partner) throw new Error('Partneri nuk u gjet');
1953:     const normalizedRequestKey=String(requestKey||'').trim();
1954:     const postingKey=normalizedRequestKey?'PAYMENT:'+normalizedRequestKey:'';
1955:     if(postingKey&&await DB.get('postingKeys',postingKey)) throw new Error('Kjo pagesë është regjistruar më parë.');
1956:     const now=new Date().toISOString(), currentActor=actor(), payment={id:DB.genId('pay'),partnerType:partnerType,partnerId:partnerId,invoiceId:invoiceId,amount:amt,method:method||'cash',requestKey:normalizedRequestKey,date:now,timestamp:now,createdBy:currentActor.username,createdByName:currentActor.displayName};
1957:     const txStores=['payments',ledgerStore,partnerStore,invoiceStore,'auditLogs'];if(postingKey)txStores.push('postingKeys');
1958:     await DB.atomicTx(txStores,'readwrite',function(stores){
1959:       stores.payments.put(payment);
1960:       charge.paidAmount=C.round2(C.toNum(charge.paidAmount)+amt);
1961:       const invoicePaid=C.round2(C.toNum(invoice.paidAmount)+amt), invoiceRemaining=C.round2(Math.max(0,payableTotal-invoicePaid));
1962:       charge.balance=invoiceRemaining;charge.status=invoiceRemaining===0?'PAID':'PARTIALLY_PAID';stores[ledgerStore].put(charge);
1963:       partner.balance=C.round2(C.toNum(partner.balance)-amt);partner.updatedAt=now;stores[partnerStore].put(partner);
1964:       invoice.paidAmount=invoicePaid;invoice.remainingAmount=invoiceRemaining;invoice.paymentStatus=invoiceRemaining===0?'PAID':'PARTIALLY_PAID';invoice.updatedAt=now;stores[invoiceStore].put(invoice);
1965:       if(postingKey)stores.postingKeys.put({id:postingKey,documentId:invoiceId,paymentId:payment.id,type:'PAYMENT_POST',createdAt:now});
1966:       stores.auditLogs.put(C.auditEntry('payment',payment.id,'RECORD',null,payment,invoiceId));
1967:     }); return payment;
1968:   }

1974:     saveSalesInvoice: saveSalesInvoice,
1975:     registerSale: registerSale,
1976:     recordPayment: recordPayment

3338:     function ancestors(id, seen) { seen = seen || {}; if (seen[id]) return []; seen[id] = true; var l = lotMap[id], out = []; if (l && l.outputBatchId) { inputs.filter(function (x) { return x.batchId === l.outputBatchId; }).forEach(function (x) { var il = lotMap[x.lotId]; if (il) { out.push(il); out = out.concat(ancestors(il.id, seen)); } }); } return out; }

3500:   function nextNumber(prefix, rows, field, companyCode) {
3501:     var year = new Date().getFullYear();
3502:     var head = prefix + '-' + year + '-';
3503:     var max = 0;
3504:     (rows || []).forEach(function (row) {
3505:       var value = String(row[field || 'docNumber'] || '');
3506:       if (companyCode && value.indexOf(prefix + '-' + companyCode + '-' + year + '-') === 0) {
3507:         max = Math.max(max, parseInt(value.split('-').pop(), 10) || 0);
3508:       } else if (!companyCode && value.indexOf(head) === 0) {
3509:         max = Math.max(max, parseInt(value.split('-').pop(), 10) || 0);
3510:       }
3511:     });
3512:     return companyCode ? prefix + '-' + companyCode + '-' + year + '-' + String(max + 1).padStart(6, '0') : head + String(max + 1).padStart(6, '0');
3513:   }

7438:   App.attachProcessLot=function(i){var input=document.getElementById('batch-lot-'+i);if(!input||input.dataset.attached)return;input.dataset.attached='1';var lots=this.data.lots.filter(T.isSaleableLot);SAC.attach(input.parentElement,{data:lots,fields:['lotNumber','productName','supplierName','locationText'],display:function(x){return x.lotNumber;},render:function(x){return '<div class="sac-code">'+App.esc(x.lotNumber)+'</div><div class="sac-sub">'+App.esc(x.productName)+' · '+App.fmtKg(x.quantityAvailable)+' '+App.esc(x.baseUnit||'')+' · '+App.esc(x.locationText||'')+'</div>';},onSelect:function(x){App._processInputs[i]={id:App._processInputs[i].id,lotId:x.id,lotNumber:x.lotNumber,productId:x.productId,productName:x.productName,quantity:App._processInputs[i].quantity||0};App.renderProcessInputs();App.processCalc();},showAllOnFocus:true});input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input'));};
7439:   App.processCalc=function(){var input=this._processInputs.reduce(function(s,x){return s+num(x.quantity);},0),out=num(value('batch-output')),waste=num(value('batch-waste')),loss=input-out-waste,y=input>0?out/input*100:0;var e=document.getElementById('batch-calc');if(e)e.innerHTML='<div class="wf-calc-row"><span>Hyrje totale:</span><strong>'+this.fmtKg(input)+' kg</strong></div><div class="wf-calc-row"><span>Dalje:</span><strong>'+this.fmtKg(out)+' kg</strong></div><div class="wf-calc-row"><span>Mbetje:</span><strong>'+this.fmtKg(waste)+' kg</strong></div><div class="wf-calc-row"><span>Humbje procesi:</span><strong class="'+(loss<0?'text-danger':'')+'">'+this.fmtKg(loss)+' kg</strong></div><div class="wf-calc-row total"><span>Rendimenti:</span><strong>'+this.fmt(y)+'%</strong></div>';};

7439:   App.processCalc=function(){var input=this._processInputs.reduce(function(s,x){return s+num(x.quantity);},0),out=num(value('batch-output')),waste=num(value('batch-waste')),loss=input-out-waste,y=input>0?out/input*100:0;var e=document.getElementById('batch-calc');if(e)e.innerHTML='<div class="wf-calc-row"><span>Hyrje totale:</span><strong>'+this.fmtKg(input)+' kg</strong></div><div class="wf-calc-row"><span>Dalje:</span><strong>'+this.fmtKg(out)+' kg</strong></div><div class="wf-calc-row"><span>Mbetje:</span><strong>'+this.fmtKg(waste)+' kg</strong></div><div class="wf-calc-row"><span>Humbje procesi:</span><strong class="'+(loss<0?'text-danger':'')+'">'+this.fmtKg(loss)+' kg</strong></div><div class="wf-calc-row total"><span>Rendimenti:</span><strong>'+this.fmt(y)+'%</strong></div>';};

3500:   function nextNumber(prefix, rows, field, companyCode) {
3501:     var year = new Date().getFullYear();
3502:     var head = prefix + '-' + year + '-';
3503:     var max = 0;
3504:     (rows || []).forEach(function (row) {
3505:       var value = String(row[field || 'docNumber'] || '');
3506:       if (companyCode && value.indexOf(prefix + '-' + companyCode + '-' + year + '-') === 0) {
3507:         max = Math.max(max, parseInt(value.split('-').pop(), 10) || 0);
3508:       } else if (!companyCode && value.indexOf(head) === 0) {
3509:         max = Math.max(max, parseInt(value.split('-').pop(), 10) || 0);
3510:       }
3511:     });
3512:     return companyCode ? prefix + '-' + companyCode + '-' + year + '-' + String(max + 1).padStart(6, '0') : head + String(max + 1).padStart(6, '0');
3513:   }

7438:   App.attachProcessLot=function(i){var input=document.getElementById('batch-lot-'+i);if(!input||input.dataset.attached)return;input.dataset.attached='1';var lots=this.data.lots.filter(T.isSaleableLot);SAC.attach(input.parentElement,{data:lots,fields:['lotNumber','productName','supplierName','locationText'],display:function(x){return x.lotNumber;},render:function(x){return '<div class="sac-code">'+App.esc(x.lotNumber)+'</div><div class="sac-sub">'+App.esc(x.productName)+' · '+App.fmtKg(x.quantityAvailable)+' '+App.esc(x.baseUnit||'')+' · '+App.esc(x.locationText||'')+'</div>';},onSelect:function(x){App._processInputs[i]={id:App._processInputs[i].id,lotId:x.id,lotNumber:x.lotNumber,productId:x.productId,productName:x.productName,quantity:App._processInputs[i].quantity||0};App.renderProcessInputs();App.processCalc();},showAllOnFocus:true});input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input'));};
7439:   App.processCalc=function(){var input=this._processInputs.reduce(function(s,x){return s+num(x.quantity);},0),out=num(value('batch-output')),waste=num(value('batch-waste')),loss=input-out-waste,y=input>0?out/input*100:0;var e=document.getElementById('batch-calc');if(e)e.innerHTML='<div class="wf-calc-row"><span>Hyrje totale:</span><strong>'+this.fmtKg(input)+' kg</strong></div><div class="wf-calc-row"><span>Dalje:</span><strong>'+this.fmtKg(out)+' kg</strong></div><div class="wf-calc-row"><span>Mbetje:</span><strong>'+this.fmtKg(waste)+' kg</strong></div><div class="wf-calc-row"><span>Humbje procesi:</span><strong class="'+(loss<0?'text-danger':'')+'">'+this.fmtKg(loss)+' kg</strong></div><div class="wf-calc-row total"><span>Rendimenti:</span><strong>'+this.fmt(y)+'%</strong></div>';};

3477:  * Sistemi Genit 6.2 — Cash and Bank domain service.
3478:  * All posted financial documents use atomic IndexedDB transactions.
3479:  * Balances are derived from posted movements; account.balance is only a cached projection.

3481: (function (global) {
3482:   'use strict';
3483:   var C = global.Calc;
3484: 
3485:   function num(v) { return C.toNum(v); }
3486:   function money(v) { return C.round2(num(v)); }
3487:   function nowIso() { return new Date().toISOString(); }
3488:   function actor() {
3489:     var u = global.Auth && global.Auth.getCurrentUser ? global.Auth.getCurrentUser() : null;
3490:     return { username: u ? u.username : 'system', displayName: u ? (u.displayName || u.username) : 'System' };
3491:   }
3492:   function clone(x) { return x ? JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(x)) : x; }
3493:   function requireRecord(record, message) { if (!record) throw new Error(message); return record; }
3494:   function positiveAmount(v) { var x = money(v); if (x <= 0) throw new Error('Shuma duhet të jetë më e madhe se zero.'); return x; }
3495:   function defaultCompanyId() { return (global.App && global.App.activeCompanyId) || 'company_default'; }
3496:   function settingsFinance(settings) {
3497:     var row = (settings || []).find(function (x) { return x.key === 'finance'; }) || {};
3498:     return { allowNegativeCash: !!row.allowNegativeCash, allowNegativeBank: row.allowNegativeBank !== false };
3499:   }
3500:   function nextNumber(prefix, rows, field, companyCode) {
3501:     var year = new Date().getFullYear();
3502:     var head = prefix + '-' + year + '-';
3503:     var max = 0;
3504:     (rows || []).forEach(function (row) {
3505:       var value = String(row[field || 'docNumber'] || '');
3506:       if (companyCode && value.indexOf(prefix + '-' + companyCode + '-' + year + '-') === 0) {
3507:         max = Math.max(max, parseInt(value.split('-').pop(), 10) || 0);
3508:       } else if (!companyCode && value.indexOf(head) === 0) {
3509:         max = Math.max(max, parseInt(value.split('-').pop(), 10) || 0);
3510:       }
3511:     });
3512:     return companyCode ? prefix + '-' + companyCode + '-' + year + '-' + String(max + 1).padStart(6, '0') : head + String(max + 1).padStart(6, '0');
3513:   }
3514:   function movementBalance(opening, rows, accountKey, accountId) {
3515:     return money(num(opening) + (rows || []).filter(function (m) {
3516:       return m[accountKey] === accountId && m.status === 'POSTED';
3517:     }).reduce(function (sum, m) {
3518:       return sum + (m.direction === 'IN' ? num(m.amount) : -num(m.amount));
3519:     }, 0));

7438:   App.attachProcessLot=function(i){var input=document.getElementById('batch-lot-'+i);if(!input||input.dataset.attached)return;input.dataset.attached='1';var lots=this.data.lots.filter(T.isSaleableLot);SAC.attach(input.parentElement,{data:lots,fields:['lotNumber','productName','supplierName','locationText'],display:function(x){return x.lotNumber;},render:function(x){return '<div class="sac-code">'+App.esc(x.lotNumber)+'</div><div class="sac-sub">'+App.esc(x.productName)+' · '+App.fmtKg(x.quantityAvailable)+' '+App.esc(x.baseUnit||'')+' · '+App.esc(x.locationText||'')+'</div>';},onSelect:function(x){App._processInputs[i]={id:App._processInputs[i].id,lotId:x.id,lotNumber:x.lotNumber,productId:x.productId,productName:x.productName,quantity:App._processInputs[i].quantity||0};App.renderProcessInputs();App.processCalc();},showAllOnFocus:true});input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input'));};
7439:   App.processCalc=function(){var input=this._processInputs.reduce(function(s,x){return s+num(x.quantity);},0),out=num(value('batch-output')),waste=num(value('batch-waste')),loss=input-out-waste,y=input>0?out/input*100:0;var e=document.getElementById('batch-calc');if(e)e.innerHTML='<div class="wf-calc-row"><span>Hyrje totale:</span><strong>'+this.fmtKg(input)+' kg</strong></div><div class="wf-calc-row"><span>Dalje:</span><strong>'+this.fmtKg(out)+' kg</strong></div><div class="wf-calc-row"><span>Mbetje:</span><strong>'+this.fmtKg(waste)+' kg</strong></div><div class="wf-calc-row"><span>Humbje procesi:</span><strong class="'+(loss<0?'text-danger':'')+'">'+this.fmtKg(loss)+' kg</strong></div><div class="wf-calc-row total"><span>Rendimenti:</span><strong>'+this.fmt(y)+'%</strong></div>';};

514:   // Business stores are isolated by the active company. Security/system stores stay global.
515:   const COMPANY_SCOPED_STORES = new Set([
516:     'documentLinks','traceFarms','traceParcels','traceFieldActivities','lots','processBatches','processBatchInputs','lotMovements',
517:     'traceQualityChecks','traceRecallCases','traceRecallItems','products','suppliers','customers','warehouses','units','categories',

526:   let _activeCompanyId = '';
527: 
528:   function setCompanyContext(companyId) { _activeCompanyId = String(companyId || '').trim(); }
529:   function getCompanyContext() { return _activeCompanyId; }
530:   function applyCompanyScope(storeName, record) {
531:     if (!record || typeof record !== 'object' || !COMPANY_SCOPED_STORES.has(storeName)) return record;
532:     if (!_activeCompanyId) return record;
533:     if (!record.companyId) record.companyId = _activeCompanyId;
534:     return record;
535:   }
536:   function inCompanyScope(storeName, record) {
537:     if (!COMPANY_SCOPED_STORES.has(storeName) || !_activeCompanyId) return true;
538:     return !record || !record.companyId || record.companyId === _activeCompanyId;
539:   }

3215:     requirePermission('documents.create');
3216:     input = input || {};
3217:     if (!input.outputProductId) throw new Error('Produkti përfundimtar është i detyrueshëm.');
3218:     if (!input.warehouseId) throw new Error('Magazina është e detyrueshme.');
3219:     if (num(input.outputQuantity) <= 0) throw new Error('Sasia e prodhuar duhet të jetë më e madhe se zero.');
3220:     var validInputs = (input.inputs || []).filter(function (x) { return x.lotId && num(x.quantity) > 0; });
3221:     if (!validInputs.length) throw new Error('Zgjidh të paktën një lot hyrës.');
3222:     var inputTotal = round3(validInputs.reduce(function (s, x) { return s + num(x.quantity); }, 0));
3223:     var wasteQty = round3(num(input.wasteQuantity));
3224:     var processLoss = round3(inputTotal - num(input.outputQuantity) - wasteQty);
3225:     if (processLoss < -0.001) throw new Error('Dalja + mbetjet nuk mund të tejkalojnë hyrjen totale.');
3226:     var existing = input.id ? await DB.get('processBatches', input.id) : null;
3227:     if (existing && existing.status !== 'DRAFT') throw new Error('Procesi i postuar/anulluar nuk mund të editohet.');
3228:     var all = await DB.getAll('processBatches');
3229:     var id = input.id || DB.genId('batch');

3233:       id: id, batchNumber: existing && existing.batchNumber || input.batchNumber || nextBatchNumber(all, input.date || now), status: 'DRAFT',
3234:       date: input.date || now, processType: input.processType || 'PACKAGING', outputQuantity: round3(input.outputQuantity), inputQuantity: inputTotal,
3235:       wasteQuantity: wasteQty, processLossQuantity: Math.max(0, processLoss), yieldPct: inputTotal > 0 ? round2(num(input.outputQuantity) / inputTotal * 100) : 0,
3236:       qualityStatus: input.qualityStatus || 'APPROVED', createdAt: existing && existing.createdAt || now, updatedAt: now,
3237:       createdBy: existing && existing.createdBy || actor().username, updatedBy: actor().username
3238:     });
3239:     var lines = validInputs.map(function (x, idx) {
3240:       return { id: x.id || DB.genId('binput'), batchId: id, seq: idx + 1, lotId: x.lotId, lotNumber: x.lotNumber || '', productId: x.productId || '', productName: x.productName || '', quantity: round3(x.quantity), createdAt: x.createdAt || now, updatedAt: now };
3241:     });

3243:       stores.processBatches.put(rec); oldInputs.forEach(function (x) { stores.processBatchInputs.delete(x.id); }); lines.forEach(function (x) { stores.processBatchInputs.put(x); });
3244:       stores.auditLogs.put(C.auditEntry('processBatch', rec.id, existing ? 'UPDATE' : 'CREATE', existing, rec, rec.batchNumber));
3245:     });
3246:     rec.inputs = lines; return rec;
3247:   }

3334:   async function traceLot(lotId) {
3335:     var lots = await DB.getAll('lots'), lotMap = {}; lots.forEach(function (x) { lotMap[x.id] = x; });
3336:     var batches = await DB.getAll('processBatches'), inputs = await DB.getAll('processBatchInputs'), allMoves = await DB.getAll('lotMovements');
3337:     var lot = lotMap[lotId]; if (!lot) throw new Error('Loti nuk u gjet.');
3338:     function ancestors(id, seen) { seen = seen || {}; if (seen[id]) return []; seen[id] = true; var l = lotMap[id], out = []; if (l && l.outputBatchId) { inputs.filter(function (x) { return x.batchId === l.outputBatchId; }).forEach(function (x) { var il = lotMap[x.lotId]; if (il) { out.push(il); out = out.concat(ancestors(il.id, seen)); } }); } return out; }
3339:     function descendants(id, seen) { seen = seen || {}; if (seen[id]) return []; seen[id] = true; var out = []; inputs.filter(function (x) { return x.lotId === id; }).forEach(function (x) { var b = batches.find(function (y) { return y.id === x.batchId; }), ol = b && lotMap[b.outputLotId]; if (ol) { out.push(ol); out = out.concat(descendants(ol.id, seen)); } }); return out; }
3340:     var ancestorLots = ancestors(lotId), descendantLots = descendants(lotId), chainIds = [lotId].concat(descendantLots.map(function (x) { return x.id; }));
3341:     var sales = allMoves.filter(function (x) { return chainIds.indexOf(x.lotId) >= 0 && x.movementType === 'SALE_OUT'; });
3342:     var qualityChecks = (await DB.getAll('traceQualityChecks')).filter(function (x) { return x.lotId === lotId || chainIds.indexOf(x.lotId) >= 0; });
3343:     var recallCases = (await DB.getAll('traceRecallCases')).filter(function (x) { return x.lotId === lotId || chainIds.indexOf(x.lotId) >= 0; });
3344:     return { lot: lot, ancestors: ancestorLots, descendants: descendantLots, movements: allMoves.filter(function (x) { return x.lotId === lotId; }).sort(function (a, b) { return new Date(a.timestamp) - new Date(b.timestamp); }), sales: sales, batches: batches, inputs: inputs, lots: lots, qualityChecks: qualityChecks, recallCases: recallCases };
3345:   }

7200:       Object.keys(pairs).forEach(function (k) { var e = document.getElementById(prefix + '-' + k); if (e) e.value = pairs[k]; });

7208:     }, { enableHighAccuracy: true, timeout: 15000, maximumAge: 0 });

7208:     }, { enableHighAccuracy: true, timeout: 15000, maximumAge: 0 });

536:   function inCompanyScope(storeName, record) {
537:     if (!COMPANY_SCOPED_STORES.has(storeName) || !_activeCompanyId) return true;
538:     return !record || !record.companyId || record.companyId === _activeCompanyId;

1913:   async function registerSale(invoiceId) {
1914:     const invoice = await DB.get('salesInvoices', invoiceId);
1915:     if (!invoice) throw new Error('Fatura e shitjes nuk u gjet');
1916:     if (invoice.status === 'POSTED') throw new Error('Kjo faturë është tashmë e regjistruar.');
1917:     if (invoice.status === 'CANCELLED') throw new Error('Fatura e anulluar nuk mund të regjistrohet.');
1918:     const postingKey='SALE_POST:'+invoice.id;
1919:     if(await DB.get('postingKeys',postingKey)) throw new Error('Kjo faturë është tashmë e regjistruar.');
1920:     const totals=C.calcInvoiceTotals(invoice.lines||[]), customer=await DB.get('customers',invoice.customerId);
1921:     if(!customer) throw new Error('Klienti nuk u gjet');
1922:     const products={};
1923:     for(const line of invoice.lines||[]){const product=await DB.get('products',line.productId);if(!product)throw new Error('Artikulli nuk u gjet: '+line.productId);const need=C.calcStockMovement(line.quantity,line.freeQty||0,line.coefficient||1);if(C.toNum(product.stock)<need)throw new Error('Stok i pamjaftueshëm për: '+product.name);products[line.productId]=product;}
1924:     const allocations = global.Traceability ? await global.Traceability.planSaleAllocations(invoice.lines||[], invoice.warehouseId) : [];
1925:     const lotMap={}; for(const a of allocations){ if(!lotMap[a.lotId]) lotMap[a.lotId]=await DB.get('lots',a.lotId); }
1926:     (invoice.lines||[]).forEach(function(line,idx){ var arr=allocations.filter(function(a){return a.lineIndex===idx;}); line.lotAllocations=arr.map(function(a){return {lotId:a.lotId,lotNumber:a.lotNumber,quantity:a.quantity};}); if(arr.length===1){line.lotId=arr[0].lotId;line.lotNumber=arr[0].lotNumber;} });
1927:     invoice.traceAllocations=allocations.map(function(a){return Object.assign({},a);}); invoice.lotIds=Array.from(new Set(allocations.map(function(a){return a.lotId;}))); invoice.lotNumbers=Array.from(new Set(allocations.map(function(a){return a.lotNumber;})));
1928:     const now=new Date().toISOString();
1929:     const txStores=['salesInvoices','stockMovements','productCards','products','customerLedger','customers','postingKeys','auditLogs']; if(allocations.length)txStores.push('lots','lotMovements');
1930:     await DB.atomicTx(txStores,'readwrite',function(stores){

1942:   async function recordPayment(partnerType, partnerId, invoiceId, amount, method, requestKey) {
1943:     const amt=C.round2(C.toNum(amount)); if(amt<=0) throw new Error('Shuma e pagesës duhet > 0');
1944:     if(partnerType!=='supplier'&&partnerType!=='customer') throw new Error('Lloji i partnerit nuk është i vlefshëm');
1945:     const invoiceStore=partnerType==='supplier'?'purchaseInvoices':'salesInvoices', ledgerStore=partnerType==='supplier'?'supplierLedger':'customerLedger', partnerStore=partnerType==='supplier'?'suppliers':'customers';
1946:     const invoice=await DB.get(invoiceStore,invoiceId); if(!invoice||invoice.status!=='POSTED') throw new Error('Fatura e regjistruar nuk u gjet');
1947:     const payableTotal=C.round2(invoice.netAfterCredits!=null?C.toNum(invoice.netAfterCredits):C.toNum(invoice.totalAmount));
1948:     const remaining=C.round2(payableTotal-C.toNum(invoice.paidAmount));
1949:     if(remaining<=0) throw new Error('Fatura është paguar plotësisht');
1950:     if(amt>remaining+0.005) throw new Error('Pagesa tejkalon shumën e mbetur: '+remaining);
1951:     const entries=await DB.getByIndex(ledgerStore,'invoiceId',invoiceId), charge=entries.find(function(e){return e.entryType==='CHARGE';}); if(!charge) throw new Error('Nuk u gjet detyrimi');
1952:     const partner=await DB.get(partnerStore,partnerId); if(!partner) throw new Error('Partneri nuk u gjet');
1953:     const normalizedRequestKey=String(requestKey||'').trim();
1954:     const postingKey=normalizedRequestKey?'PAYMENT:'+normalizedRequestKey:'';
1955:     if(postingKey&&await DB.get('postingKeys',postingKey)) throw new Error('Kjo pagesë është regjistruar më parë.');
1956:     const now=new Date().toISOString(), currentActor=actor(), payment={id:DB.genId('pay'),partnerType:partnerType,partnerId:partnerId,invoiceId:invoiceId,amount:amt,method:method||'cash',requestKey:normalizedRequestKey,date:now,timestamp:now,createdBy:currentActor.username,createdByName:currentActor.displayName};
1957:     const txStores=['payments',ledgerStore,partnerStore,invoiceStore,'auditLogs'];if(postingKey)txStores.push('postingKeys');
1958:     await DB.atomicTx(txStores,'readwrite',function(stores){
1959:       stores.payments.put(payment);
1960:       charge.paidAmount=C.round2(C.toNum(charge.paidAmount)+amt);
1961:       const invoicePaid=C.round2(C.toNum(invoice.paidAmount)+amt), invoiceRemaining=C.round2(Math.max(0,payableTotal-invoicePaid));
1962:       charge.balance=invoiceRemaining;charge.status=invoiceRemaining===0?'PAID':'PARTIALLY_PAID';stores[ledgerStore].put(charge);
1963:       partner.balance=C.round2(C.toNum(partner.balance)-amt);partner.updatedAt=now;stores[partnerStore].put(partner);
1964:       invoice.paidAmount=invoicePaid;invoice.remainingAmount=invoiceRemaining;invoice.paymentStatus=invoiceRemaining===0?'PAID':'PARTIALLY_PAID';invoice.updatedAt=now;stores[invoiceStore].put(invoice);
1965:       if(postingKey)stores.postingKeys.put({id:postingKey,documentId:invoiceId,paymentId:payment.id,type:'PAYMENT_POST',createdAt:now});
1966:       stores.auditLogs.put(C.auditEntry('payment',payment.id,'RECORD',null,payment,invoiceId));
1967:     }); return payment;
1968:   }

1804:   async function cancelPurchase(invoiceId) {
1805:     const invoice = await DB.get('purchaseInvoices', invoiceId);
1806:     if (!invoice) throw new Error('Fatura nuk u gjet');
1807:     if (invoice.status === 'CANCELLED') throw new Error('Fatura është tashmë e anulluar');
1808:     const wasPosted = invoice.status === 'POSTED';
1809: 
1810:     if (wasPosted) {
1811:       // Atomic reversal of all effects
1812:       await DB.atomicTx(
1813:         ['purchaseInvoices', 'stockMovements', 'supplierLedger', 'auditLogs'],
1814:         'readwrite',
1815:         function (stores) {
1816:           // Reverse stock
1817:           invoice.lines.forEach(function (line) {
1818:             const lc = C.calcInvoiceLine(line);
1819:             stores.stockMovements.put({
1820:               id: DB.genId('sm'),
1821:               productId: line.productId,
1822:               warehouseId: invoice.warehouseId,
1823:               movementType: 'OUT_REVERSAL',
1824:               sourceDocType: 'purchase_cancel',
1825:               sourceDocId: invoice.id,
1826:               sourceDocNumber: invoice.docNumber,
1827:               quantity: -lc.quantity,
1828:               unit: line.unit,
1829:               unitCost: lc.unitPrice,

1831:               value: -lc.baseAmount,

1804:   async function cancelPurchase(invoiceId) {
1805:     const invoice = await DB.get('purchaseInvoices', invoiceId);
1806:     if (!invoice) throw new Error('Fatura nuk u gjet');
1807:     if (invoice.status === 'CANCELLED') throw new Error('Fatura është tashmë e anulluar');
1808:     const wasPosted = invoice.status === 'POSTED';
1809: 
1810:     if (wasPosted) {
1811:       // Atomic reversal of all effects
1812:       await DB.atomicTx(
1813:         ['purchaseInvoices', 'stockMovements', 'supplierLedger', 'auditLogs'],
1814:         'readwrite',
1815:         function (stores) {
1816:           // Reverse stock
1817:           invoice.lines.forEach(function (line) {
1818:             const lc = C.calcInvoiceLine(line);
1819:             stores.stockMovements.put({
1820:               id: DB.genId('sm'),
1821:               productId: line.productId,
1822:               warehouseId: invoice.warehouseId,
1823:               movementType: 'OUT_REVERSAL',
1824:               sourceDocType: 'purchase_cancel',
1825:               sourceDocId: invoice.id,
1826:               sourceDocNumber: invoice.docNumber,
1827:               quantity: -lc.quantity,
1828:               unit: line.unit,
1829:               unitCost: lc.unitPrice,
1830:               baseUnitQuantity: -lc.quantity,
1831:               value: -lc.baseAmount,
1832:               timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
1833:             });
1834:           });
1835:           // Reverse supplier ledger

1839:             invoiceId: invoice.id,

1913:   async function registerSale(invoiceId) {
1914:     const invoice = await DB.get('salesInvoices', invoiceId);
1915:     if (!invoice) throw new Error('Fatura e shitjes nuk u gjet');
1916:     if (invoice.status === 'POSTED') throw new Error('Kjo faturë është tashmë e regjistruar.');
1917:     if (invoice.status === 'CANCELLED') throw new Error('Fatura e anulluar nuk mund të regjistrohet.');
1918:     const postingKey='SALE_POST:'+invoice.id;
1919:     if(await DB.get('postingKeys',postingKey)) throw new Error('Kjo faturë është tashmë e regjistruar.');
1920:     const totals=C.calcInvoiceTotals(invoice.lines||[]), customer=await DB.get('customers',invoice.customerId);
1921:     if(!customer) throw new Error('Klienti nuk u gjet');
1922:     const products={};
1923:     for(const line of invoice.lines||[]){const product=await DB.get('products',line.productId);if(!product)throw new Error('Artikulli nuk u gjet: '+line.productId);const need=C.calcStockMovement(line.quantity,line.freeQty||0,line.coefficient||1);if(C.toNum(product.stock)<need)throw new Error('Stok i pamjaftueshëm për: '+product.name);products[line.productId]=product;}
1924:     const allocations = global.Traceability ? await global.Traceability.planSaleAllocations(invoice.lines||[], invoice.warehouseId) : [];
1925:     const lotMap={}; for(const a of allocations){ if(!lotMap[a.lotId]) lotMap[a.lotId]=await DB.get('lots',a.lotId); }
1926:     (invoice.lines||[]).forEach(function(line,idx){ var arr=allocations.filter(function(a){return a.lineIndex===idx;}); line.lotAllocations=arr.map(function(a){return {lotId:a.lotId,lotNumber:a.lotNumber,quantity:a.quantity};}); if(arr.length===1){line.lotId=arr[0].lotId;line.lotNumber=arr[0].lotNumber;} });
1927:     invoice.traceAllocations=allocations.map(function(a){return Object.assign({},a);}); invoice.lotIds=Array.from(new Set(allocations.map(function(a){return a.lotId;}))); invoice.lotNumbers=Array.from(new Set(allocations.map(function(a){return a.lotNumber;})));
1928:     const now=new Date().toISOString();
1929:     const txStores=['salesInvoices','stockMovements','productCards','products','customerLedger','customers','postingKeys','auditLogs']; if(allocations.length)txStores.push('lots','lotMovements');
1930:     await DB.atomicTx(txStores,'readwrite',function(stores){
1931:       invoice.status='POSTED';invoice.postedAt=now;invoice.postedBy=actor().username;invoice.postedByName=actor().displayName;invoice.baseAmount=totals.baseAmount;invoice.vatAmount=totals.vatAmount;invoice.totalAmount=totals.totalAmount;invoice.paidAmount=C.toNum(invoice.paidAmount);invoice.remainingAmount=C.round2(totals.totalAmount-invoice.paidAmount);invoice.paymentStatus=invoice.remainingAmount===0?'PAID':(invoice.paidAmount>0?'PARTIALLY_PAID':'UNPAID');stores.salesInvoices.put(invoice);
