1940:   // PAYMENT RECORDING
1941:   // ================================================================
1942:   async function recordPayment(partnerType, partnerId, invoiceId, amount, method, requestKey) {
1943:     const amt=C.round2(C.toNum(amount)); if(amt<=0) throw new Error('Shuma e pagesës duhet > 0');
1944:     if(partnerType!=='supplier'&&partnerType!=='customer') throw new Error('Lloji i partnerit nuk është i vlefshëm');
1945:     const invoiceStore=partnerType==='supplier'?'purchaseInvoices':'salesInvoices', ledgerStore=partnerType==='supplier'?'supplierLedger':'customerLedger', partnerStore=partnerType==='supplier'?'suppliers':'customers';
1946:     const invoice=await DB.get(invoiceStore,invoiceId); if(!invoice||invoice.status!=='POSTED') throw new Error('Fatura e regjistruar nuk u gjet');
1947:     const payableTotal=C.round2(invoice.netAfterCredits!=null?C.toNum(invoice.netAfterCredits):C.toNum(invoice.totalAmount));
1948:     const remaining=C.round2(payableTotal-C.toNum(invoice.paidAmount));
1949:     if(remaining<=0) throw new Error('Fatura është paguar plotësisht');
1950:     if(amt>remaining+0.005) throw new Error('Pagesa tejkalon shumën e mbetur: '+remaining);
1951:     const entries=await DB.getByIndex(ledgerStore,'invoiceId',invoiceId), charge=entries.find(function(e){return e.entryType==='CHARGE';}); if(!charge) throw new Error('Nuk u gjet detyrimi');
1952:     const partner=await DB.get(partnerStore,partnerId); if(!partner) throw new Error('Partneri nuk u gjet');
1953:     const normalizedRequestKey=String(requestKey||'').trim();
1954:     const postingKey=normalizedRequestKey?'PAYMENT:'+normalizedRequestKey:'';
1955:     if(postingKey&&await DB.get('postingKeys',postingKey)) throw new Error('Kjo pagesë është regjistruar më parë.');
1956:     const now=new Date().toISOString(), currentActor=actor(), payment={id:DB.genId('pay'),partnerType:partnerType,partnerId:partnerId,invoiceId:invoiceId,amount:amt,method:method||'cash',requestKey:normalizedRequestKey,date:now,timestamp:now,createdBy:currentActor.username,createdByName:currentActor.displayName};
1957:     const txStores=['payments',ledgerStore,partnerStore,invoiceStore,'auditLogs'];if(postingKey)txStores.push('postingKeys');
1958:     await DB.atomicTx(txStores,'readwrite',function(stores){
1959:       stores.payments.put(payment);
1960:       charge.paidAmount=C.round2(C.toNum(charge.paidAmount)+amt);
1961:       const invoicePaid=C.round2(C.toNum(invoice.paidAmount)+amt), invoiceRemaining=C.round2(Math.max(0,payableTotal-invoicePaid));
1962:       charge.balance=invoiceRemaining;charge.status=invoiceRemaining===0?'PAID':'PARTIALLY_PAID';stores[ledgerStore].put(charge);
1963:       partner.balance=C.round2(C.toNum(partner.balance)-amt);partner.updatedAt=now;stores[partnerStore].put(partner);
1964:       invoice.paidAmount=invoicePaid;invoice.remainingAmount=invoiceRemaining;invoice.paymentStatus=invoiceRemaining===0?'PAID':'PARTIALLY_PAID';invoice.updatedAt=now;stores[invoiceStore].put(invoice);
1965:       if(postingKey)stores.postingKeys.put({id:postingKey,documentId:invoiceId,paymentId:payment.id,type:'PAYMENT_POST',createdAt:now});
1966:       stores.auditLogs.put(C.auditEntry('payment',payment.id,'RECORD',null,payment,invoiceId));
1967:     }); return payment;
1968:   }
1969: 
1970:   global.Services = {
1971:     saveWeightForm: saveWeightForm,
1972:     registerPurchase: registerPurchase,
1973:     cancelPurchase: cancelPurchase,
1974:     saveSalesInvoice: saveSalesInvoice,
1975:     registerSale: registerSale,
1976:     recordPayment: recordPayment
1977:   };
1978: })(window);

1929:     const txStores=['salesInvoices','stockMovements','productCards','products','customerLedger','customers','postingKeys','auditLogs']; if(allocations.length)txStores.push('lots','lotMovements');
1930:     await DB.atomicTx(txStores,'readwrite',function(stores){
1931:       invoice.status='POSTED';invoice.postedAt=now;invoice.postedBy=actor().username;invoice.postedByName=actor().displayName;invoice.baseAmount=totals.baseAmount;invoice.vatAmount=totals.vatAmount;invoice.totalAmount=totals.totalAmount;invoice.paidAmount=C.toNum(invoice.paidAmount);invoice.remainingAmount=C.round2(totals.totalAmount-invoice.paidAmount);invoice.paymentStatus=invoice.remainingAmount===0?'PAID':(invoice.paidAmount>0?'PARTIALLY_PAID':'UNPAID');stores.salesInvoices.put(invoice);
1932:       (invoice.lines||[]).forEach(function(line){const lc=C.calcInvoiceLine(line),qty=C.calcStockMovement(line.quantity,line.freeQty||0,line.coefficient||1),product=products[line.productId];product.stock=C.round3(C.toNum(product.stock)-qty);product.updatedAt=now;stores.products.put(product);stores.stockMovements.put({id:DB.genId('sm'),productId:line.productId,warehouseId:invoice.warehouseId,movementType:'OUT',sourceDocType:'sale',sourceDocId:invoice.id,sourceDocNumber:invoice.docNumber,quantity:-qty,soldQty:C.toNum(line.quantity),freeQty:C.toNum(line.freeQty),baseUnitQuantity:-qty,unit:line.unit,unitCost:lc.unitPrice,value:-lc.baseAmount,timestamp:now,lotId:line.lotId||'',lotNumber:line.lotNumber||'',lotNumbers:(line.lotAllocations||[]).map(function(x){return x.lotNumber;})});stores.productCards.put({id:DB.genId('pc'),productId:line.productId,sourceDocId:invoice.id,sourceDocNumber:invoice.docNumber,type:'SALE_OUT',date:invoice.date,quantityIn:0,quantityOut:qty,freeQty:C.toNum(line.freeQty),balance:product.stock,unitPrice:lc.unitPrice,value:lc.baseAmount,timestamp:now,lotId:line.lotId||'',lotNumber:line.lotNumber||''});});
1933:       allocations.forEach(function(a){var lot=lotMap[a.lotId];lot.quantityAvailable=C.round3(global.Traceability.lotAvailable(lot)-a.quantity);lot.quantityConsumed=C.round3(C.toNum(lot.quantityConsumed)+a.quantity);lot.status=lot.quantityAvailable<=0.0001?'DEPLETED':'AVAILABLE';lot.updatedAt=now;stores.lots.put(lot);stores.lotMovements.put({id:DB.genId('lm'),lotId:lot.id,lotNumber:lot.lotNumber,productId:a.productId,movementType:'SALE_OUT',quantity:-a.quantity,balanceAfter:lot.quantityAvailable,sourceDocType:'salesInvoice',sourceDocId:invoice.id,sourceDocNumber:invoice.docNumber,customerId:invoice.customerId,customerName:invoice.customerName,warehouseId:invoice.warehouseId,timestamp:now,createdBy:actor().username});});
1934:       stores.customerLedger.put({id:DB.genId('cl'),customerId:invoice.customerId,invoiceId:invoice.id,docNumber:invoice.docNumber,entryType:'CHARGE',amount:totals.totalAmount,paidAmount:0,balance:totals.totalAmount,date:invoice.date,dueDate:invoice.dueDate,status:'UNPAID',timestamp:now});customer.totalSales=C.round2(C.toNum(customer.totalSales)+totals.totalAmount);customer.balance=C.round2(C.toNum(customer.balance)+totals.totalAmount);customer.updatedAt=now;stores.customers.put(customer);stores.postingKeys.put({id:postingKey,documentId:invoice.id,type:'SALE_POST',createdAt:now});stores.auditLogs.put(C.auditEntry('salesInvoice',invoice.id,'REGISTER_ATOMIC',null,invoice,invoice.docNumber));
1935:     });
1936:     return invoice;
1937:   }

1939:   // ================================================================
1940:   // PAYMENT RECORDING
1941:   // ================================================================
1942:   async function recordPayment(partnerType, partnerId, invoiceId, amount, method, requestKey) {
1943:     const amt=C.round2(C.toNum(amount)); if(amt<=0) throw new Error('Shuma e pagesës duhet > 0');
1944:     if(partnerType!=='supplier'&&partnerType!=='customer') throw new Error('Lloji i partnerit nuk është i vlefshëm');
1945:     const invoiceStore=partnerType==='supplier'?'purchaseInvoices':'salesInvoices', ledgerStore=partnerType==='supplier'?'supplierLedger':'customerLedger', partnerStore=partnerType==='supplier'?'suppliers':'customers';
1946:     const invoice=await DB.get(invoiceStore,invoiceId); if(!invoice||invoice.status!=='POSTED') throw new Error('Fatura e regjistruar nuk u gjet');
1947:     const payableTotal=C.round2(invoice.netAfterCredits!=null?C.toNum(invoice.netAfterCredits):C.toNum(invoice.totalAmount));
1948:     const remaining=C.round2(payableTotal-C.toNum(invoice.paidAmount));
1949:     if(remaining<=0) throw new Error('Fatura është paguar plotësisht');
1950:     if(amt>remaining+0.005) throw new Error('Pagesa tejkalon shumën e mbetur: '+remaining);
1951:     const entries=await DB.getByIndex(ledgerStore,'invoiceId',invoiceId), charge=entries.find(function(e){return e.entryType==='CHARGE';}); if(!charge) throw new Error('Nuk u gjet detyrimi');
1952:     const partner=await DB.get(partnerStore,partnerId); if(!partner) throw new Error('Partneri nuk u gjet');
1953:     const normalizedRequestKey=String(requestKey||'').trim();
1954:     const postingKey=normalizedRequestKey?'PAYMENT:'+normalizedRequestKey:'';
1955:     if(postingKey&&await DB.get('postingKeys',postingKey)) throw new Error('Kjo pagesë është regjistruar më parë.');
1956:     const now=new Date().toISOString(), currentActor=actor(), payment={id:DB.genId('pay'),partnerType:partnerType,partnerId:partnerId,invoiceId:invoiceId,amount:amt,method:method||'cash',requestKey:normalizedRequestKey,date:now,timestamp:now,createdBy:currentActor.username,createdByName:currentActor.displayName};
1957:     const txStores=['payments',ledgerStore,partnerStore,invoiceStore,'auditLogs'];if(postingKey)txStores.push('postingKeys');
1958:     await DB.atomicTx(txStores,'readwrite',function(stores){
1959:       stores.payments.put(payment);
1960:       charge.paidAmount=C.round2(C.toNum(charge.paidAmount)+amt);
1961:       const invoicePaid=C.round2(C.toNum(invoice.paidAmount)+amt), invoiceRemaining=C.round2(Math.max(0,payableTotal-invoicePaid));
1962:       charge.balance=invoiceRemaining;charge.status=invoiceRemaining===0?'PAID':'PARTIALLY_PAID';stores[ledgerStore].put(charge);
1963:       partner.balance=C.round2(C.toNum(partner.balance)-amt);partner.updatedAt=now;stores[partnerStore].put(partner);
1964:       invoice.paidAmount=invoicePaid;invoice.remainingAmount=invoiceRemaining;invoice.paymentStatus=invoiceRemaining===0?'PAID':'PARTIALLY_PAID';invoice.updatedAt=now;stores[invoiceStore].put(invoice);
1965:       if(postingKey)stores.postingKeys.put({id:postingKey,documentId:invoiceId,paymentId:payment.id,type:'PAYMENT_POST',createdAt:now});
1966:       stores.auditLogs.put(C.auditEntry('payment',payment.id,'RECORD',null,payment,invoiceId));
1967:     }); return payment;
1968:   }

1972:     registerPurchase: registerPurchase,
1973:     cancelPurchase: cancelPurchase,
1974:     saveSalesInvoice: saveSalesInvoice,
1975:     registerSale: registerSale,
1976:     recordPayment: recordPayment
1977:   };

2819:       });

2828:   function orderStatusAfterPurchase(order) {
2829:     var anyReceived = order.lines.some(function (l) { return num(l.receivedQty) > 0; });
2830:     var allReceived = order.lines.every(function (l) { return num(l.receivedQty) + 0.0001 >= num(l.orderedQty || l.quantity); });
2831:     var allInvoiced = order.lines.every(function (l) { return num(l.invoicedQty) + 0.0001 >= num(l.receivedQty) && num(l.receivedQty) > 0; });
2832:     return allInvoiced && allReceived ? 'INVOICED' : allReceived ? 'RECEIVED' : anyReceived ? 'PARTIALLY_RECEIVED' : 'CONFIRMED';
2833:   }

2835:     var anyDelivered = order.lines.some(function (l) { return num(l.deliveredQty) > 0; });

2838:     return allInvoiced && allDelivered ? 'INVOICED' : allDelivered ? 'TO_INVOICE' : anyDelivered ? 'PARTIALLY_DELIVERED' : 'CONFIRMED';
2839:   }

2940:   function dateOnly(value) {
2941:     var d = value ? new Date(value) : new Date();
2942:     if (isNaN(d.getTime())) d = new Date();
2943:     return d.toISOString().slice(0, 10);
2944:   }
2945:   function monthCode(value) { return dateOnly(value).slice(0, 7).replace('-', ''); }
2946:   function dayCode(value) { return dateOnly(value).replace(/-/g, ''); }
2947:   function sourceTag(value) { return String(value || '').toUpperCase() === 'WILD_COLLECTION' ? 'E' : 'K'; }
2948:   function mapUrl(lat, lng) {
2949:     if (!Number.isFinite(Number(lat)) || !Number.isFinite(Number(lng))) return '';
2950:     return 'https://www.openstreetmap.org/?mlat=' + Number(lat).toFixed(6) + '&mlon=' + Number(lng).toFixed(6) + '#map=16/' + Number(lat).toFixed(6) + '/' + Number(lng).toFixed(6);
2951:   }

2955:   }

2957:   function isSaleableLot(lot) {
2958:     return !!lot && lot.status === 'AVAILABLE' && lotAvailable(lot) > 0.0001 && String(lot.qualityStatus || 'APPROVED') === 'APPROVED';
2959:   }
2960:   function rawLotBase(product, supplier, harvestMonth, parcelCode, sourceType) {
2961:     var productToken = normalizeToken(product && (product.traceLotPrefix || product.code || product.name), 'BIME').slice(0, 14);
2962:     var supplierToken = normalizeToken(supplier && (supplier.code || supplier.name), 'FERMER').slice(0, 14);
2963:     var month = String(harvestMonth || '').replace(/[^0-9]/g, '');
2964:     if (month.length !== 6) month = monthCode(harvestMonth || new Date());
2965:     return [productToken, supplierToken, month, normalizeToken(parcelCode, 'ZONE').slice(0, 14), sourceTag(sourceType)].join('-');
2966:   }
2967:   function nextNumber(records, base, field, digits) {
2968:     field = field || 'lotNumber'; digits = digits || 3;
2969:     var re = new RegExp('^' + String(base).replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&') + '-(\\d+)$', 'i');
2970:     var max = 0;
2971:     (records || []).forEach(function (x) {
2972:       var m = String(x && x[field] || '').match(re);
2973:       if (m) max = Math.max(max, parseInt(m[1], 10) || 0);
2974:     });
2975:     return base + '-' + String(max + 1).padStart(digits, '0');
2976:   }
2977:   function outputLotBase(product, batchDate) {
2978:     return [normalizeToken(product && (product.traceLotPrefix || product.code || product.name), 'PROD').slice(0, 14), 'PKT', dayCode(batchDate)].join('-');
2979:   }

2982:   }
2983:   function nextRecallNumber(records, date) {

3155:   async function planSaleAllocations(lines, warehouseId) {
3156:     var products = await DB.getAll('products');
3157:     var productMap = {}; products.forEach(function (p) { productMap[p.id] = p; });
3158:     var lots = await DB.getAll('lots');
3159:     var remaining = {}; lots.forEach(function (lot) { remaining[lot.id] = lotAvailable(lot); });
3160:     var allocations = [];
3161:     for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
3162:       var line = lines[i], product = productMap[line.productId];
3163:       if (!product) throw new Error('Artikulli nuk u gjet gjatë alokimit të lotit.');
3164:       var need = round3(C.calcStockMovement(line.quantity, line.freeQty || 0, line.coefficient || 1));
3165:       var candidates = lots.filter(function (lot) {
3166:         return lot.productId === line.productId && isSaleableLot(lot) && remaining[lot.id] > 0.0001 && (!warehouseId || !lot.warehouseId || lot.warehouseId === warehouseId);
3167:       }).sort(function (a, b) {
3168:         if (line.lotId) { if (a.id === line.lotId) return -1; if (b.id === line.lotId) return 1; }
3169:         var ae = a.expiryDate ? new Date(a.expiryDate).getTime() : Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER;
3170:         var be = b.expiryDate ? new Date(b.expiryDate).getTime() : Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER;
3171:         if (ae !== be) return ae - be;
3172:         return new Date(a.productionDate || a.harvestDate || a.sourceDate || a.createdAt || 0) - new Date(b.productionDate || b.harvestDate || b.sourceDate || b.createdAt || 0);
3173:       });
3174:       var traceRequired = product.traceabilityEnabled === true || candidates.length > 0;
3175:       if (!traceRequired) continue;
3176:       if (line.lotId) candidates = candidates.filter(function (lot) { return lot.id === line.lotId; });
3177:       var left = need;
3178:       for (var c = 0; c < candidates.length && left > 0.0001; c++) {
3179:         var lot = candidates[c], take = round3(Math.min(left, remaining[lot.id]));
3180:         if (take <= 0) continue;
3181:         allocations.push({ lineId: line.id || '', lineIndex: i, productId: line.productId, lotId: lot.id, lotNumber: lot.lotNumber, quantity: take });
3182:         remaining[lot.id] = round3(remaining[lot.id] - take); left = round3(left - take);
3183:       }
3184:       if (left > 0.0001) throw new Error('Sasi loti e pamjaftueshme ose loti është në karantinë për ' + product.name + '. Mungojnë ' + left + ' ' + (product.baseUnit || '') + '.');
3185:     }
3186:     return allocations;
3187:   }

3300:   async function cancelProcessBatch(batchId, reason) {
3301:     requirePermission('documents.cancel');
3302:     var batch = await DB.get('processBatches', batchId);
3303:     if (!batch) throw new Error('Procesi nuk u gjet.');
3304:     if (batch.status !== 'POSTED') throw new Error('Vetëm procesi i postuar mund të anullohet.');
3305:     var outputLot = await DB.get('lots', batch.outputLotId);
3306:     if (!outputLot) throw new Error('Loti përfundimtar nuk u gjet.');
3307:     if (Math.abs(lotAvailable(outputLot) - num(outputLot.quantityCreated)) > 0.0001) throw new Error('Loti përfundimtar është përdorur ose shitur; procesi nuk mund të anullohet.');

3309:     var outputProduct = await DB.get('products', batch.outputProductId);

3311:     products[outputProduct.id] = outputProduct;

3315:       inputs.forEach(function (line) {

3320:         stores.stockMovements.put({ id: DB.genId('sm'), productId: p.id, warehouseId: batch.warehouseId, movementType: 'IN_PROCESS_REVERSAL', sourceDocType: 'processBatchCancellation', sourceDocId: batch.id, sourceDocNumber: batch.batchNumber, quantity: qty, baseUnitQuantity: qty, unit: p.baseUnit, timestamp: now, lotId: lot.id, lotNumber: lot.lotNumber });

3334:   async function traceLot(lotId) {
3335:     var lots = await DB.getAll('lots'), lotMap = {}; lots.forEach(function (x) { lotMap[x.id] = x; });
3336:     var batches = await DB.getAll('processBatches'), inputs = await DB.getAll('processBatchInputs'), allMoves = await DB.getAll('lotMovements');
3337:     var lot = lotMap[lotId]; if (!lot) throw new Error('Loti nuk u gjet.');

3291:       stores.productCards.put({ id: DB.genId('pc'), productId: outputProduct.id, sourceDocId: batch.id, sourceDocNumber: batch.batchNumber, type: 'PROCESS_OUTPUT', date: batch.date, quantityIn: outputQty, quantityOut: 0, balance: outputProduct.stock, unitCost: outputUnitCost, value: round2(outputQty * outputUnitCost), timestamp: now, lotId: outputLotId, lotNumber: outputNumber });
3292:       stores.priceHistory.put({ id: DB.genId('ph'), productId: outputProduct.id, sourceDocId: batch.id, docNumber: batch.batchNumber, date: batch.date, price: outputUnitCost, quantity: outputQty, priceType: 'PROCESS_COST', timestamp: now });
3293:       batch.status = 'POSTED'; batch.outputLotId = outputLotId; batch.outputLotNumber = outputNumber; batch.outputUnitCost = outputUnitCost; batch.postedAt = now; batch.postedBy = actor().username; batch.updatedAt = now; stores.processBatches.put(batch);
3294:       stores.postingKeys.put({ id: postingKey, documentId: batch.id, type: 'PROCESS_POST', createdAt: now });
3295:       stores.auditLogs.put(C.auditEntry('processBatch', batch.id, 'POST_ATOMIC', before, batch, batch.batchNumber));
3296:     });
3297:     batch.inputs = inputs; return batch;

3300:   async function cancelProcessBatch(batchId, reason) {
3301:     requirePermission('documents.cancel');
3302:     var batch = await DB.get('processBatches', batchId);
3303:     if (!batch) throw new Error('Procesi nuk u gjet.');
3304:     if (batch.status !== 'POSTED') throw new Error('Vetëm procesi i postuar mund të anullohet.');
3305:     var outputLot = await DB.get('lots', batch.outputLotId);
3306:     if (!outputLot) throw new Error('Loti përfundimtar nuk u gjet.');
3307:     if (Math.abs(lotAvailable(outputLot) - num(outputLot.quantityCreated)) > 0.0001) throw new Error('Loti përfundimtar është përdorur ose shitur; procesi nuk mund të anullohet.');
3308:     var inputs = await DB.getByIndex('processBatchInputs', 'batchId', batch.id), inputLots = {}, products = {};
3309:     var outputProduct = await DB.get('products', batch.outputProductId);
3310:     if (!outputProduct || num(outputProduct.stock) + 0.0001 < num(outputLot.quantityCreated)) throw new Error('Stoku përfundimtar nuk lejon anullimin.');
3311:     products[outputProduct.id] = outputProduct;
3312:     for (var i = 0; i < inputs.length; i++) { var lot = await DB.get('lots', inputs[i].lotId), p = lot && await DB.get('products', lot.productId); if (!lot || !p) throw new Error('Loti/artikulli hyrës mungon.'); inputLots[lot.id] = lot; products[p.id] = p; }
3313:     var now = nowIso(), before = clone(batch);
3314:     await DB.atomicTx(['processBatches', 'lots', 'lotMovements', 'products', 'stockMovements', 'productCards', 'auditLogs'], 'readwrite', function (stores) {
3315:       inputs.forEach(function (line) {
3316:         var lot = inputLots[line.lotId], p = products[lot.productId], qty = round3(line.quantity);
3317:         lot.quantityAvailable = round3(lotAvailable(lot) + qty); lot.quantityConsumed = round3(Math.max(0, num(lot.quantityConsumed) - qty)); lot.status = lot.qualityStatus === 'APPROVED' ? 'AVAILABLE' : 'QUARANTINE'; lot.updatedAt = now; stores.lots.put(lot);
3318:         p.stock = round3(num(p.stock) + qty); p.updatedAt = now; stores.products.put(p);
3319:         stores.lotMovements.put({ id: DB.genId('lm'), lotId: lot.id, lotNumber: lot.lotNumber, productId: lot.productId, movementType: 'PROCESS_CANCEL_RESTORE', quantity: qty, balanceAfter: lot.quantityAvailable, sourceDocType: 'processBatchCancellation', sourceDocId: batch.id, sourceDocNumber: batch.batchNumber, batchId: batch.id, timestamp: now });
3320:         stores.stockMovements.put({ id: DB.genId('sm'), productId: p.id, warehouseId: batch.warehouseId, movementType: 'IN_PROCESS_REVERSAL', sourceDocType: 'processBatchCancellation', sourceDocId: batch.id, sourceDocNumber: batch.batchNumber, quantity: qty, baseUnitQuantity: qty, unit: p.baseUnit, timestamp: now, lotId: lot.id, lotNumber: lot.lotNumber });
3321:         stores.productCards.put({ id: DB.genId('pc'), productId: p.id, sourceDocId: batch.id, sourceDocNumber: batch.batchNumber, type: 'PROCESS_CANCEL_RESTORE', date: now, quantityIn: qty, quantityOut: 0, balance: p.stock, timestamp: now, lotId: lot.id, lotNumber: lot.lotNumber });
3322:       });
3323:       outputProduct.stock = round3(num(outputProduct.stock) - num(outputLot.quantityCreated)); outputProduct.updatedAt = now; stores.products.put(outputProduct);
3324:       outputLot.quantityAvailable = 0; outputLot.quantityConsumed = round3(num(outputLot.quantityCreated)); outputLot.status = 'CANCELLED'; outputLot.updatedAt = now; stores.lots.put(outputLot);
3325:       stores.lotMovements.put({ id: DB.genId('lm'), lotId: outputLot.id, lotNumber: outputLot.lotNumber, productId: outputLot.productId, movementType: 'PROCESS_OUTPUT_CANCEL', quantity: -num(outputLot.quantityCreated), balanceAfter: 0, sourceDocType: 'processBatchCancellation', sourceDocId: batch.id, sourceDocNumber: batch.batchNumber, batchId: batch.id, timestamp: now });
3326:       stores.stockMovements.put({ id: DB.genId('sm'), productId: outputProduct.id, warehouseId: batch.warehouseId, movementType: 'OUT_PROCESS_REVERSAL', sourceDocType: 'processBatchCancellation', sourceDocId: batch.id, sourceDocNumber: batch.batchNumber, quantity: -num(outputLot.quantityCreated), baseUnitQuantity: -num(outputLot.quantityCreated), unit: outputProduct.baseUnit, timestamp: now, lotId: outputLot.id, lotNumber: outputLot.lotNumber });
3327:       stores.productCards.put({ id: DB.genId('pc'), productId: outputProduct.id, sourceDocId: batch.id, sourceDocNumber: batch.batchNumber, type: 'PROCESS_OUTPUT_CANCEL', date: now, quantityIn: 0, quantityOut: num(outputLot.quantityCreated), balance: outputProduct.stock, timestamp: now, lotId: outputLot.id, lotNumber: outputLot.lotNumber });
3328:       batch.status = 'CANCELLED'; batch.cancelledAt = now; batch.cancellationReason = reason || 'Anullim nga përdoruesi'; batch.updatedAt = now; stores.processBatches.put(batch);
3329:       stores.auditLogs.put(C.auditEntry('processBatch', batch.id, 'CANCEL_ATOMIC', before, batch, batch.batchNumber));
3330:     });
3331:     return batch;

3333: 
3334:   async function traceLot(lotId) {
3335:     var lots = await DB.getAll('lots'), lotMap = {}; lots.forEach(function (x) { lotMap[x.id] = x; });
3336:     var batches = await DB.getAll('processBatches'), inputs = await DB.getAll('processBatchInputs'), allMoves = await DB.getAll('lotMovements');
3337:     var lot = lotMap[lotId]; if (!lot) throw new Error('Loti nuk u gjet.');
3338:     function ancestors(id, seen) { seen = seen || {}; if (seen[id]) return []; seen[id] = true; var l = lotMap[id], out = []; if (l && l.outputBatchId) { inputs.filter(function (x) { return x.batchId === l.outputBatchId; }).forEach(function (x) { var il = lotMap[x.lotId]; if (il) { out.push(il); out = out.concat(ancestors(il.id, seen)); } }); } return out; }
3339:     function descendants(id, seen) { seen = seen || {}; if (seen[id]) return []; seen[id] = true; var out = []; inputs.filter(function (x) { return x.lotId === id; }).forEach(function (x) { var b = batches.find(function (y) { return y.id === x.batchId; }), ol = b && lotMap[b.outputLotId]; if (ol) { out.push(ol); out = out.concat(descendants(ol.id, seen)); } }); return out; }
3340:     var ancestorLots = ancestors(lotId), descendantLots = descendants(lotId), chainIds = [lotId].concat(descendantLots.map(function (x) { return x.id; }));
3341:     var sales = allMoves.filter(function (x) { return chainIds.indexOf(x.lotId) >= 0 && x.movementType === 'SALE_OUT'; });
3342:     var qualityChecks = (await DB.getAll('traceQualityChecks')).filter(function (x) { return x.lotId === lotId || chainIds.indexOf(x.lotId) >= 0; });
3343:     var recallCases = (await DB.getAll('traceRecallCases')).filter(function (x) { return x.lotId === lotId || chainIds.indexOf(x.lotId) >= 0; });
3344:     return { lot: lot, ancestors: ancestorLots, descendants: descendantLots, movements: allMoves.filter(function (x) { return x.lotId === lotId; }).sort(function (a, b) { return new Date(a.timestamp) - new Date(b.timestamp); }), sales: sales, batches: batches, inputs: inputs, lots: lots, qualityChecks: qualityChecks, recallCases: recallCases };
3345:   }

3347:   async function createRecallCase(input) {
3348:     requirePermission('documents.cancel');
3349:     input = input || {};
3350:     if (!input.lotId) throw new Error('Zgjidh lotin për tërheqje.');
3351:     var trace = await traceLot(input.lotId), all = await DB.getAll('traceRecallCases'), now = nowIso();
3352:     var rec = { id: DB.genId('recall'), recallNumber: nextRecallNumber(all, now), recallType: input.recallType === 'REAL' ? 'REAL' : 'MOCK', lotId: input.lotId, lotNumber: trace.lot.lotNumber, status: 'OPEN', severity: input.severity || 'MEDIUM', reason: String(input.reason || '').trim(), initiatedAt: now, initiatedBy: actor().username, notes: input.notes || '', createdAt: now, updatedAt: now };
3353:     var salesInvoices = await DB.getAll('salesInvoices'), customers = await DB.getAll('customers'), customerMap = {}, invoiceMap = {};
3354:     customers.forEach(function (x) { customerMap[x.id] = x; }); salesInvoices.forEach(function (x) { invoiceMap[x.id] = x; });
3355:     var grouped = {};
3356:     trace.sales.forEach(function (m) { var key = m.sourceDocId + ':' + m.customerId + ':' + m.lotId; if (!grouped[key]) grouped[key] = { quantity: 0, move: m }; grouped[key].quantity += Math.abs(num(m.quantity)); });
3357:     var items = Object.keys(grouped).map(function (key) { var g = grouped[key], inv = invoiceMap[g.move.sourceDocId] || {}, cust = customerMap[g.move.customerId] || {}; return { id: DB.genId('rci'), recallId: rec.id, lotId: g.move.lotId, lotNumber: g.move.lotNumber, salesInvoiceId: g.move.sourceDocId, salesInvoiceNumber: g.move.sourceDocNumber || inv.docNumber || '', customerId: g.move.customerId || inv.customerId || '', customerName: cust.name || inv.customerName || '', quantitySold: round3(g.quantity), quantityReturned: 0, status: 'TO_CONTACT', createdAt: now }; });
3358:     await DB.atomicTx(['traceRecallCases', 'traceRecallItems', 'auditLogs'], 'readwrite', function (stores) { stores.traceRecallCases.put(rec); items.forEach(function (x) { stores.traceRecallItems.put(x); }); stores.auditLogs.put(C.auditEntry('traceRecallCase', rec.id, 'OPEN', null, rec, rec.recallNumber)); });
3359:     rec.items = items; return rec;
3360:   }

3362:   async function updateRecallItem(id, patch) {
3363:     requirePermission('documents.cancel');
3364:     var rec = await DB.get('traceRecallItems', id); if (!rec) throw new Error('Rreshti i tërheqjes nuk u gjet.'); var before = clone(rec);
3365:     Object.assign(rec, patch || {}, { quantityReturned: round3(patch && patch.quantityReturned != null ? patch.quantityReturned : rec.quantityReturned), updatedAt: nowIso(), updatedBy: actor().username });
3366:     await DB.atomicTx(['traceRecallItems', 'auditLogs'], 'readwrite', function (stores) { stores.traceRecallItems.put(rec); stores.auditLogs.put(C.auditEntry('traceRecallItem', rec.id, 'UPDATE', before, rec, rec.salesInvoiceNumber)); }); return rec;
3367:   }

3369:   async function closeRecallCase(id, notes) {
3370:     requirePermission('documents.cancel');
3371:     var rec = await DB.get('traceRecallCases', id); if (!rec) throw new Error('Rasti i tërheqjes nuk u gjet.'); if (rec.status === 'CLOSED') throw new Error('Rasti është mbyllur.'); var before = clone(rec);
3372:     rec.status = 'CLOSED'; rec.closedAt = nowIso(); rec.closedBy = actor().username; rec.closureNotes = notes || ''; rec.updatedAt = nowIso();
3373:     await DB.atomicTx(['traceRecallCases', 'auditLogs'], 'readwrite', function (stores) { stores.traceRecallCases.put(rec); stores.auditLogs.put(C.auditEntry('traceRecallCase', rec.id, 'CLOSE', before, rec, rec.recallNumber)); }); return rec;
3374:   }

3334:   async function traceLot(lotId) {
3335:     var lots = await DB.getAll('lots'), lotMap = {}; lots.forEach(function (x) { lotMap[x.id] = x; });
3336:     var batches = await DB.getAll('processBatches'), inputs = await DB.getAll('processBatchInputs'), allMoves = await DB.getAll('lotMovements');
3337:     var lot = lotMap[lotId]; if (!lot) throw new Error('Loti nuk u gjet.');
3338:     function ancestors(id, seen) { seen = seen || {}; if (seen[id]) return []; seen[id] = true; var l = lotMap[id], out = []; if (l && l.outputBatchId) { inputs.filter(function (x) { return x.batchId === l.outputBatchId; }).forEach(function (x) { var il = lotMap[x.lotId]; if (il) { out.push(il); out = out.concat(ancestors(il.id, seen)); } }); } return out; }
3339:     function descendants(id, seen) { seen = seen || {}; if (seen[id]) return []; seen[id] = true; var out = []; inputs.filter(function (x) { return x.lotId === id; }).forEach(function (x) { var b = batches.find(function (y) { return y.id === x.batchId; }), ol = b && lotMap[b.outputLotId]; if (ol) { out.push(ol); out = out.concat(descendants(ol.id, seen)); } }); return out; }
3340:     var ancestorLots = ancestors(lotId), descendantLots = descendants(lotId), chainIds = [lotId].concat(descendantLots.map(function (x) { return x.id; }));
3341:     var sales = allMoves.filter(function (x) { return chainIds.indexOf(x.lotId) >= 0 && x.movementType === 'SALE_OUT'; });
3342:     var qualityChecks = (await DB.getAll('traceQualityChecks')).filter(function (x) { return x.lotId === lotId || chainIds.indexOf(x.lotId) >= 0; });
3343:     var recallCases = (await DB.getAll('traceRecallCases')).filter(function (x) { return x.lotId === lotId || chainIds.indexOf(x.lotId) >= 0; });
3344:     return { lot: lot, ancestors: ancestorLots, descendants: descendantLots, movements: allMoves.filter(function (x) { return x.lotId === lotId; }).sort(function (a, b) { return new Date(a.timestamp) - new Date(b.timestamp); }), sales: sales, batches: batches, inputs: inputs, lots: lots, qualityChecks: qualityChecks, recallCases: recallCases };
3345:   }

3155:   async function planSaleAllocations(lines, warehouseId) {
3156:     var products = await DB.getAll('products');
3157:     var productMap = {}; products.forEach(function (p) { productMap[p.id] = p; });
3158:     var lots = await DB.getAll('lots');
3159:     var remaining = {}; lots.forEach(function (lot) { remaining[lot.id] = lotAvailable(lot); });
3160:     var allocations = [];
3161:     for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
3162:       var line = lines[i], product = productMap[line.productId];
3163:       if (!product) throw new Error('Artikulli nuk u gjet gjatë alokimit të lotit.');
3164:       var need = round3(C.calcStockMovement(line.quantity, line.freeQty || 0, line.coefficient || 1));
3165:       var candidates = lots.filter(function (lot) {
3166:         return lot.productId === line.productId && isSaleableLot(lot) && remaining[lot.id] > 0.0001 && (!warehouseId || !lot.warehouseId || lot.warehouseId === warehouseId);
3167:       }).sort(function (a, b) {
3168:         if (line.lotId) { if (a.id === line.lotId) return -1; if (b.id === line.lotId) return 1; }
3169:         var ae = a.expiryDate ? new Date(a.expiryDate).getTime() : Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER;
3170:         var be = b.expiryDate ? new Date(b.expiryDate).getTime() : Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER;
3171:         if (ae !== be) return ae - be;
3172:         return new Date(a.productionDate || a.harvestDate || a.sourceDate || a.createdAt || 0) - new Date(b.productionDate || b.harvestDate || b.sourceDate || b.createdAt || 0);
3173:       });
3174:       var traceRequired = product.traceabilityEnabled === true || candidates.length > 0;
3175:       if (!traceRequired) continue;
3176:       if (line.lotId) candidates = candidates.filter(function (lot) { return lot.id === line.lotId; });
3177:       var left = need;
3178:       for (var c = 0; c < candidates.length && left > 0.0001; c++) {
3179:         var lot = candidates[c], take = round3(Math.min(left, remaining[lot.id]));
3180:         if (take <= 0) continue;
3181:         allocations.push({ lineId: line.id || '', lineIndex: i, productId: line.productId, lotId: lot.id, lotNumber: lot.lotNumber, quantity: take });
3182:         remaining[lot.id] = round3(remaining[lot.id] - take); left = round3(left - take);
3183:       }

3185:     }
3186:     return allocations;
3187:   }

3334:   async function traceLot(lotId) {
3335:     var lots = await DB.getAll('lots'), lotMap = {}; lots.forEach(function (x) { lotMap[x.id] = x; });
3336:     var batches = await DB.getAll('processBatches'), inputs = await DB.getAll('processBatchInputs'), allMoves = await DB.getAll('lotMovements');
3337:     var lot = lotMap[lotId]; if (!lot) throw new Error('Loti nuk u gjet.');
3338:     function ancestors(id, seen) { seen = seen || {}; if (seen[id]) return []; seen[id] = true; var l = lotMap[id], out = []; if (l && l.outputBatchId) { inputs.filter(function (x) { return x.batchId === l.outputBatchId; }).forEach(function (x) { var il = lotMap[x.lotId]; if (il) { out.push(il); out = out.concat(ancestors(il.id, seen)); } }); } return out; }
3339:     function descendants(id, seen) { seen = seen || {}; if (seen[id]) return []; seen[id] = true; var out = []; inputs.filter(function (x) { return x.lotId === id; }).forEach(function (x) { var b = batches.find(function (y) { return y.id === x.batchId; }), ol = b && lotMap[b.outputLotId]; if (ol) { out.push(ol); out = out.concat(descendants(ol.id, seen)); } }); return out; }
3340:     var ancestorLots = ancestors(lotId), descendantLots = descendants(lotId), chainIds = [lotId].concat(descendantLots.map(function (x) { return x.id; }));
3341:     var sales = allMoves.filter(function (x) { return chainIds.indexOf(x.lotId) >= 0 && x.movementType === 'SALE_OUT'; });
3342:     var qualityChecks = (await DB.getAll('traceQualityChecks')).filter(function (x) { return x.lotId === lotId || chainIds.indexOf(x.lotId) >= 0; });
3343:     var recallCases = (await DB.getAll('traceRecallCases')).filter(function (x) { return x.lotId === lotId || chainIds.indexOf(x.lotId) >= 0; });
3344:     return { lot: lot, ancestors: ancestorLots, descendants: descendantLots, movements: allMoves.filter(function (x) { return x.lotId === lotId; }).sort(function (a, b) { return new Date(a.timestamp) - new Date(b.timestamp); }), sales: sales, batches: batches, inputs: inputs, lots: lots, qualityChecks: qualityChecks, recallCases: recallCases };
3345:   }

3347:   async function createRecallCase(input) {
3348:     requirePermission('documents.cancel');
3349:     input = input || {};
3350:     if (!input.lotId) throw new Error('Zgjidh lotin për tërheqje.');

3300:   async function cancelProcessBatch(batchId, reason) {
3301:     requirePermission('documents.cancel');
3302:     var batch = await DB.get('processBatches', batchId);
3303:     if (!batch) throw new Error('Procesi nuk u gjet.');
3304:     if (batch.status !== 'POSTED') throw new Error('Vetëm procesi i postuar mund të anullohet.');
3305:     var outputLot = await DB.get('lots', batch.outputLotId);
3306:     if (!outputLot) throw new Error('Loti përfundimtar nuk u gjet.');
3307:     if (Math.abs(lotAvailable(outputLot) - num(outputLot.quantityCreated)) > 0.0001) throw new Error('Loti përfundimtar është përdorur ose shitur; procesi nuk mund të anullohet.');
3308:     var inputs = await DB.getByIndex('processBatchInputs', 'batchId', batch.id), inputLots = {}, products = {};
3309:     var outputProduct = await DB.get('products', batch.outputProductId);
3310:     if (!outputProduct || num(outputProduct.stock) + 0.0001 < num(outputLot.quantityCreated)) throw new Error('Stoku përfundimtar nuk lejon anullimin.');
3311:     products[outputProduct.id] = outputProduct;
3312:     for (var i = 0; i < inputs.length; i++) { var lot = await DB.get('lots', inputs[i].lotId), p = lot && await DB.get('products', lot.productId); if (!lot || !p) throw new Error('Loti/artikulli hyrës mungon.'); inputLots[lot.id] = lot; products[p.id] = p; }
3313:     var now = nowIso(), before = clone(batch);

3315:       inputs.forEach(function (line) {
3316:         var lot = inputLots[line.lotId], p = products[lot.productId], qty = round3(line.quantity);
3317:         lot.quantityAvailable = round3(lotAvailable(lot) + qty); lot.quantityConsumed = round3(Math.max(0, num(lot.quantityConsumed) - qty)); lot.status = lot.qualityStatus === 'APPROVED' ? 'AVAILABLE' : 'QUARANTINE'; lot.updatedAt = now; stores.lots.put(lot);
3318:         p.stock = round3(num(p.stock) + qty); p.updatedAt = now; stores.products.put(p);
3319:         stores.lotMovements.put({ id: DB.genId('lm'), lotId: lot.id, lotNumber: lot.lotNumber, productId: lot.productId, movementType: 'PROCESS_CANCEL_RESTORE', quantity: qty, balanceAfter: lot.quantityAvailable, sourceDocType: 'processBatchCancellation', sourceDocId: batch.id, sourceDocNumber: batch.batchNumber, batchId: batch.id, timestamp: now });
3320:         stores.stockMovements.put({ id: DB.genId('sm'), productId: p.id, warehouseId: batch.warehouseId, movementType: 'IN_PROCESS_REVERSAL', sourceDocType: 'processBatchCancellation', sourceDocId: batch.id, sourceDocNumber: batch.batchNumber, quantity: qty, baseUnitQuantity: qty, unit: p.baseUnit, timestamp: now, lotId: lot.id, lotNumber: lot.lotNumber });
3321:         stores.productCards.put({ id: DB.genId('pc'), productId: p.id, sourceDocId: batch.id, sourceDocNumber: batch.batchNumber, type: 'PROCESS_CANCEL_RESTORE', date: now, quantityIn: qty, quantityOut: 0, balance: p.stock, timestamp: now, lotId: lot.id, lotNumber: lot.lotNumber });

3333: 
3334:   async function traceLot(lotId) {
3335:     var lots = await DB.getAll('lots'), lotMap = {}; lots.forEach(function (x) { lotMap[x.id] = x; });
3336:     var batches = await DB.getAll('processBatches'), inputs = await DB.getAll('processBatchInputs'), allMoves = await DB.getAll('lotMovements');
3337:     var lot = lotMap[lotId]; if (!lot) throw new Error('Loti nuk u gjet.');
3338:     function ancestors(id, seen) { seen = seen || {}; if (seen[id]) return []; seen[id] = true; var l = lotMap[id], out = []; if (l && l.outputBatchId) { inputs.filter(function (x) { return x.batchId === l.outputBatchId; }).forEach(function (x) { var il = lotMap[x.lotId]; if (il) { out.push(il); out = out.concat(ancestors(il.id, seen)); } }); } return out; }
3339:     function descendants(id, seen) { seen = seen || {}; if (seen[id]) return []; seen[id] = true; var out = []; inputs.filter(function (x) { return x.lotId === id; }).forEach(function (x) { var b = batches.find(function (y) { return y.id === x.batchId; }), ol = b && lotMap[b.outputLotId]; if (ol) { out.push(ol); out = out.concat(descendants(ol.id, seen)); } }); return out; }
3340:     var ancestorLots = ancestors(lotId), descendantLots = descendants(lotId), chainIds = [lotId].concat(descendantLots.map(function (x) { return x.id; }));
3341:     var sales = allMoves.filter(function (x) { return chainIds.indexOf(x.lotId) >= 0 && x.movementType === 'SALE_OUT'; });
3342:     var qualityChecks = (await DB.getAll('traceQualityChecks')).filter(function (x) { return x.lotId === lotId || chainIds.indexOf(x.lotId) >= 0; });
3343:     var recallCases = (await DB.getAll('traceRecallCases')).filter(function (x) { return x.lotId === lotId || chainIds.indexOf(x.lotId) >= 0; });
3344:     return { lot: lot, ancestors: ancestorLots, descendants: descendantLots, movements: allMoves.filter(function (x) { return x.lotId === lotId; }).sort(function (a, b) { return new Date(a.timestamp) - new Date(b.timestamp); }), sales: sales, batches: batches, inputs: inputs, lots: lots, qualityChecks: qualityChecks, recallCases: recallCases };
3345:   }

'REAL' : 'MOCK', lotId: input.lotId, lotNumber: trace.lot.lotNumber, status: 'OPEN', severity: input.severity || 'MEDIUM', reason: String(input.reason || '').trim(), initiatedAt: now, initiatedBy: actor().username, notes: input.notes || '', createdAt: now, updatedAt: now };

3369:   async function closeRecallCase(id, notes) {
3370:     requirePermission('documents.cancel');
3371:     var rec = await DB.get('traceRecallCases', id); if (!rec) throw new Error('Rasti i tërheqjes nuk u gjet.'); if (rec.status === 'CLOSED') throw new Error('Rasti është mbyllur.'); var before = clone(rec);

3334:   async function traceLot(lotId) {
3335:     var lots = await DB.getAll('lots'), lotMap = {}; lots.forEach(function (x) { lotMap[x.id] = x; });
3336:     var batches = await DB.getAll('processBatches'), inputs = await DB.getAll('processBatchInputs'), allMoves = await DB.getAll('lotMovements');
3337:     var lot = lotMap[lotId]; if (!lot) throw new Error('Loti nuk u gjet.');
3338:     function ancestors(id, seen) { seen = seen || {}; if (seen[id]) return []; seen[id] = true; var l = lotMap[id], out = []; if (l && l.outputBatchId) { inputs.filter(function (x) { return x.batchId === l.outputBatchId; }).forEach(function (x) { var il = lotMap[x.lotId]; if (il) { out.push(il); out = out.concat(ancestors(il.id, seen)); } }); } return out; }
3339:     function descendants(id, seen) { seen = seen || {}; if (seen[id]) return []; seen[id] = true; var out = []; inputs.filter(function (x) { return x.lotId === id; }).forEach(function (x) { var b = batches.find(function (y) { return y.id === x.batchId; }), ol = b && lotMap[b.outputLotId]; if (ol) { out.push(ol); out = out.concat(descendants(ol.id, seen)); } }); return out; }
3340:     var ancestorLots = ancestors(lotId), descendantLots = descendants(lotId), chainIds = [lotId].concat(descendantLots.map(function (x) { return x.id; }));
3341:     var sales = allMoves.filter(function (x) { return chainIds.indexOf(x.lotId) >= 0 && x.movementType === 'SALE_OUT'; });
3342:     var qualityChecks = (await DB.getAll('traceQualityChecks')).filter(function (x) { return x.lotId === lotId || chainIds.indexOf(x.lotId) >= 0; });
3343:     var recallCases = (await DB.getAll('traceRecallCases')).filter(function (x) { return x.lotId === lotId || chainIds.indexOf(x.lotId) >= 0; });
3344:     return { lot: lot, ancestors: ancestorLots, descendants: descendantLots, movements: allMoves.filter(function (x) { return x.lotId === lotId; }).sort(function (a, b) { return new Date(a.timestamp) - new Date(b.timestamp); }), sales: sales, batches: batches, inputs: inputs, lots: lots, qualityChecks: qualityChecks, recallCases: recallCases };
3345:   }

3347:   async function createRecallCase(input) {
3348:     requirePermission('documents.cancel');
3349:     input = input || {};
3350:     if (!input.lotId) throw new Error('Zgjidh lotin për tërheqje.');
3351:     var trace = await traceLot(input.lotId), all = await DB.getAll('traceRecallCases'), now = nowIso();
3352:     var rec = { id: DB.genId('recall'), recallNumber: nextRecallNumber(all, now), recallType: input.recallType === 'REAL' ? 'REAL' : 'MOCK', lotId: input.lotId, lotNumber: trace.lot.lotNumber, status: 'OPEN', severity: input.severity || 'MEDIUM', reason: String(input.reason || '').trim(), initiatedAt: now, initiatedBy: actor().username, notes: input.notes || '', createdAt: now, updatedAt: now };
3353:     var salesInvoices = await DB.getAll('salesInvoices'), customers = await DB.getAll('customers'), customerMap = {}, invoiceMap = {};
3354:     customers.forEach(function (x) { customerMap[x.id] = x; }); salesInvoices.forEach(function (x) { invoiceMap[x.id] = x; });
3355:     var grouped = {};
3356:     trace.sales.forEach(function (m) { var key = m.sourceDocId + ':' + m.customerId + ':' + m.lotId; if (!grouped[key]) grouped[key] = { quantity: 0, move: m }; grouped[key].quantity += Math.abs(num(m.quantity)); });
3357:     var items = Object.keys(grouped).map(function (key) { var g = grouped[key], inv = invoiceMap[g.move.sourceDocId] || {}, cust = customerMap[g.move.customerId] || {}; return { id: DB.genId('rci'), recallId: rec.id, lotId: g.move.lotId, lotNumber: g.move.lotNumber, salesInvoiceId: g.move.sourceDocId, salesInvoiceNumber: g.move.sourceDocNumber || inv.docNumber || '', customerId: g.move.customerId || inv.customerId || '', customerName: cust.name || inv.customerName || '', quantitySold: round3(g.quantity), quantityReturned: 0, status: 'TO_CONTACT', createdAt: now }; });
3358:     await DB.atomicTx(['traceRecallCases', 'traceRecallItems', 'auditLogs'], 'readwrite', function (stores) { stores.traceRecallCases.put(rec); items.forEach(function (x) { stores.traceRecallItems.put(x); }); stores.auditLogs.put(C.auditEntry('traceRecallCase', rec.id, 'OPEN', null, rec, rec.recallNumber)); });
3359:     rec.items = items; return rec;
3360:   }

3320:         stores.stockMovements.put({ id: DB.genId('sm'), productId: p.id, warehouseId: batch.warehouseId, movementType: 'IN_PROCESS_REVERSAL', sourceDocType: 'processBatchCancellation', sourceDocId: batch.id, sourceDocNumber: batch.batchNumber, quantity: qty, baseUnitQuantity: qty, unit: p.baseUnit, timestamp: now, lotId: lot.id, lotNumber: lot.lotNumber });

3334:   async function traceLot(lotId) {
3335:     var lots = await DB.getAll('lots'), lotMap = {}; lots.forEach(function (x) { lotMap[x.id] = x; });
3336:     var batches = await DB.getAll('processBatches'), inputs = await DB.getAll('processBatchInputs'), allMoves = await DB.getAll('lotMovements');
3337:     var lot = lotMap[lotId]; if (!lot) throw new Error('Loti nuk u gjet.');
3338:     function ancestors(id, seen) { seen = seen || {}; if (seen[id]) return []; seen[id] = true; var l = lotMap[id], out = []; if (l && l.outputBatchId) { inputs.filter(function (x) { return x.batchId === l.outputBatchId; }).forEach(function (x) { var il = lotMap[x.lotId]; if (il) { out.push(il); out = out.concat(ancestors(il.id, seen)); } }); } return out; }
3339:     function descendants(id, seen) { seen = seen || {}; if (seen[id]) return []; seen[id] = true; var out = []; inputs.filter(function (x) { return x.lotId === id; }).forEach(function (x) { var b = batches.find(function (y) { return y.id === x.batchId; }), ol = b && lotMap[b.outputLotId]; if (ol) { out.push(ol); out = out.concat(descendants(ol.id, seen)); } }); return out; }
3340:     var ancestorLots = ancestors(lotId), descendantLots = descendants(lotId), chainIds = [lotId].concat(descendantLots.map(function (x) { return x.id; }));
3341:     var sales = allMoves.filter(function (x) { return chainIds.indexOf(x.lotId) >= 0 && x.movementType === 'SALE_OUT'; });
3342:     var qualityChecks = (await DB.getAll('traceQualityChecks')).filter(function (x) { return x.lotId === lotId || chainIds.indexOf(x.lotId) >= 0; });
3343:     var recallCases = (await DB.getAll('traceRecallCases')).filter(function (x) { return x.lotId === lotId || chainIds.indexOf(x.lotId) >= 0; });
3344:     return { lot: lot, ancestors: ancestorLots, descendants: descendantLots, movements: allMoves.filter(function (x) { return x.lotId === lotId; }).sort(function (a, b) { return new Date(a.timestamp) - new Date(b.timestamp); }), sales: sales, batches: batches, inputs: inputs, lots: lots, qualityChecks: qualityChecks, recallCases: recallCases };
3345:   }

3347:   async function createRecallCase(input) {
3348:     requirePermission('documents.cancel');
3349:     input = input || {};
3350:     if (!input.lotId) throw new Error('Zgjidh lotin për tërheqje.');
3351:     var trace = await traceLot(input.lotId), all = await DB.getAll('traceRecallCases'), now = nowIso();
3352:     var rec = { id: DB.genId('recall'), recallNumber: nextRecallNumber(all, now), recallType: input.recallType === 'REAL' ? 'REAL' : 'MOCK', lotId: input.lotId, lotNumber: trace.lot.lotNumber, status: 'OPEN', severity: input.severity || 'MEDIUM', reason: String(input.reason || '').trim(), initiatedAt: now, initiatedBy: actor().username, notes: input.notes || '', createdAt: now, updatedAt: now };
3353:     var salesInvoices = await DB.getAll('salesInvoices'), customers = await DB.getAll('customers'), customerMap = {}, invoiceMap = {};
3354:     customers.forEach(function (x) { customerMap[x.id] = x; }); salesInvoices.forEach(function (x) { invoiceMap[x.id] = x; });
3355:     var grouped = {};
3356:     trace.sales.forEach(function (m) { var key = m.sourceDocId + ':' + m.customerId + ':' + m.lotId; if (!grouped[key]) grouped[key] = { quantity: 0, move: m }; grouped[key].quantity += Math.abs(num(m.quantity)); });
3357:     var items = Object.keys(grouped).map(function (key) { var g = grouped[key], inv = invoiceMap[g.move.sourceDocId] || {}, cust = customerMap[g.move.customerId] || {}; return { id: DB.genId('rci'), recallId: rec.id, lotId: g.move.lotId, lotNumber: g.move.lotNumber, salesInvoiceId: g.move.sourceDocId, salesInvoiceNumber: g.move.sourceDocNumber || inv.docNumber || '', customerId: g.move.customerId || inv.customerId || '', customerName: cust.name || inv.customerName || '', quantitySold: round3(g.quantity), quantityReturned: 0, status: 'TO_CONTACT', createdAt: now }; });
3358:     await DB.atomicTx(['traceRecallCases', 'traceRecallItems', 'auditLogs'], 'readwrite', function (stores) { stores.traceRecallCases.put(rec); items.forEach(function (x) { stores.traceRecallItems.put(x); }); stores.auditLogs.put(C.auditEntry('traceRecallCase', rec.id, 'OPEN', null, rec, rec.recallNumber)); });
3359:     rec.items = items; return rec;
3360:   }

3365:     Object.assign(rec, patch || {}, { quantityReturned: round3(patch && patch.quantityReturned != null ? patch.quantityReturned : rec.quantityReturned), updatedAt: nowIso(), updatedBy: actor().username });

3382:   S.cancelPurchase = async function (invoiceId, reason) {
3383:     var invoice = await DB.get('purchaseInvoices', invoiceId);
3384:     if (!invoice) throw new Error('Fatura nuk u gjet.');
3385:     var lots = await DB.getByIndex('lots', 'sourceDocId', invoiceId);
3386:     if (!lots.length) return baseCancelPurchase(invoiceId, reason);
3387:     if (invoice.status === 'CANCELLED') throw new Error('Fatura është tashmë e anulluar.');
3388:     if (num(invoice.paidAmount) > 0) throw new Error('Fatura ka pagesa. Anullo pagesat ose përdor notë krediti.');
3389:     lots.forEach(function (lot) {
3390:       if (Math.abs(lotAvailable(lot) - num(lot.quantityCreated)) > 0.0001) throw new Error('Loti ' + lot.lotNumber + ' është përdorur në proces ose shitje. Blerja nuk mund të anullohet; përdor kthim/korrigjim të gjurmueshëm.');
3391:     });
3392:     var lines = invoice.lines && invoice.lines.length ? invoice.lines : await DB.getByIndex('purchaseItems', 'invoiceId', invoice.id);
3393:     var supplier = await DB.get('suppliers', invoice.supplierId), wf = invoice.weightFormId ? await DB.get('weightForms', invoice.weightFormId) : null;
3394:     var receipt = invoice.receiptId ? await DB.get('purchaseReceipts', invoice.receiptId) : null;
3395:     var order = invoice.purchaseOrderId ? await DB.get('purchaseOrders', invoice.purchaseOrderId) : null;
3396:     var orderItems = order ? await DB.getByIndex('purchaseOrderItems', 'orderId', order.id) : [];
3397:     var products = {};
3398:     for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
3399:       var p = await DB.get('products', lines[i].productId); if (!p) throw new Error('Artikulli nuk u gjet.');
3400:       var q = C.calcStockMovement(lines[i].quantity, lines[i].freeQty || 0, lines[i].coefficient || 1);
3401:       if (num(p.stock) + 0.0001 < q) throw new Error('Stoku aktual nuk lejon anullimin për ' + p.name + '.'); products[p.id] = p;
3402:     }
3403:     var now = nowIso(), before = clone(invoice);
3404:     await DB.atomicTx(['purchaseInvoices','supplierLedger','suppliers','weightForms','purchaseReceipts','purchaseOrders','purchaseOrderItems','products','stockMovements','productCards','lots','lotMovements','auditLogs'], 'readwrite', function (stores) {
3405:       lines.forEach(function (line) {
3406:         var calc = C.calcInvoiceLine(line), q = C.calcStockMovement(line.quantity, line.freeQty || 0, line.coefficient || 1), p = products[line.productId];

3429:   S.cancelSale = async function (invoiceId, reason) {

3431:     if (!invoice) throw new Error('Fatura e shitjes nuk u gjet.');
3432:     var allocations = invoice.traceAllocations || [];
3433:     if (!allocations.length) return baseCancelSale(invoiceId, reason);
3434:     if (invoice.status === 'CANCELLED') throw new Error('Fatura është tashmë e anulluar.');
3435:     if (num(invoice.paidAmount) > 0) throw new Error('Fatura ka pagesa. Anullo pagesat ose përdor notë krediti.');
3436:     var lines = invoice.lines && invoice.lines.length ? invoice.lines : await DB.getByIndex('salesItems', 'invoiceId', invoice.id);
3437:     var customer = await DB.get('customers', invoice.customerId), delivery = invoice.deliveryNoteId ? await DB.get('deliveryNotes', invoice.deliveryNoteId) : null;
3438:     var order = invoice.salesOrderId ? await DB.get('salesOrders', invoice.salesOrderId) : null;
3439:     var orderItems = order ? await DB.getByIndex('salesOrderItems', 'orderId', order.id) : [];
3440:     var products = {}, lots = {};
3441:     for (var i=0;i<lines.length;i++){var p=await DB.get('products',lines[i].productId);if(!p)throw new Error('Artikulli nuk u gjet.');products[p.id]=p;}
3442:     for (var a=0;a<allocations.length;a++){var lot=await DB.get('lots',allocations[a].lotId);if(!lot)throw new Error('Loti i shitjes nuk u gjet: '+allocations[a].lotNumber);lots[lot.id]=lot;}
3443:     var now=nowIso(),before=clone(invoice);
3444:     await DB.atomicTx(['salesInvoices','customerLedger','customers','deliveryNotes','salesOrders','salesOrderItems','products','stockMovements','productCards','lots','lotMovements','auditLogs'],'readwrite',function(stores){
3445:       lines.forEach(function(line){var calc=C.calcInvoiceLine(line),q=C.calcStockMovement(line.quantity,line.freeQty||0,line.coefficient||1),p=products[line.productId];p.stock=round3(num(p.stock)+q);p.updatedAt=now;stores.products.put(p);stores.stockMovements.put({id:DB.genId('sm'),productId:line.productId,warehouseId:invoice.warehouseId,movementType:'IN_REVERSAL',sourceDocType:'saleCancellation',sourceDocId:invoice.id,sourceDocNumber:invoice.docNumber,quantity:q,freeQty:num(line.freeQty),baseUnitQuantity:q,unit:line.unit,unitCost:num(p.avgPrice),value:round2(q*num(p.avgPrice)),timestamp:now,lotId:line.lotId||'',lotNumber:line.lotNumber||''});stores.productCards.put({id:DB.genId('pc'),productId:line.productId,sourceDocId:invoice.id,sourceDocNumber:invoice.docNumber,type:'SALE_REVERSAL_IN',date:now,quantityIn:q,quantityOut:0,freeQty:num(line.freeQty),balance:p.stock,value:-calc.baseAmount,timestamp:now,lotId:line.lotId||'',lotNumber:line.lotNumber||''});});
3446:       allocations.forEach(function(a){var lot=lots[a.lotId];lot.quantityAvailable=round3(lotAvailable(lot)+num(a.quantity));lot.quantityConsumed=round3(Math.max(0,num(lot.quantityConsumed)-num(a.quantity)));lot.status=lot.qualityStatus==='APPROVED'?'AVAILABLE':'QUARANTINE';lot.updatedAt=now;stores.lots.put(lot);stores.lotMovements.put({id:DB.genId('lm'),lotId:lot.id,lotNumber:lot.lotNumber,productId:a.productId,movementType:'SALE_CANCEL_RESTORE',quantity:num(a.quantity),balanceAfter:lot.quantityAvailable,sourceDocType:'saleCancellation',sourceDocId:invoice.id,sourceDocNumber:invoice.docNumber,customerId:invoice.customerId,customerName:invoice.customerName,warehouseId:invoice.warehouseId,timestamp:now,createdBy:actor().username});});
3447:       stores.customerLedger.put({id:DB.genId('cl'),customerId:invoice.customerId,invoiceId:invoice.id,docNumber:invoice.docNumber,entryType:'REVERSAL',amount:-num(invoice.totalAmount),paidAmount:0,balance:-num(invoice.totalAmount),date:now,status:'REVERSED',timestamp:now});
3448:       if(customer){customer.totalSales=round2(num(customer.totalSales)-num(invoice.totalAmount));customer.balance=round2(num(customer.balance)-num(invoice.remainingAmount));customer.updatedAt=now;stores.customers.put(customer);}
3449:       if(delivery){delivery.status='CANCELLED';delivery.cancelledAt=now;delivery.cancellationReason=reason||'Anullim i faturës së shitjes';delivery.updatedAt=now;stores.deliveryNotes.put(delivery);}
3450:       if(order){lines.forEach(function(line){var oi=orderItems.find(function(x){return x.id===line.orderItemId;})||orderItems.find(function(x){return x.productId===line.productId;});if(oi){oi.deliveredQty=round3(Math.max(0,num(oi.deliveredQty)-num(line.quantity)));oi.invoicedQty=round3(Math.max(0,num(oi.invoicedQty)-num(line.quantity)));stores.salesOrderItems.put(oi);}});if(order.invoiceId===invoice.id)order.invoiceId='';order.updatedAt=now;stores.salesOrders.put(order);}
3451:       invoice.status='CANCELLED';invoice.cancelledAt=now;invoice.cancellationReason=reason||'Anullim nga përdoruesi';invoice.remainingAmount=0;invoice.paymentStatus='CANCELLED';invoice.updatedAt=now;stores.salesInvoices.put(invoice);
3452:       stores.auditLogs.put(C.auditEntry('salesInvoice',invoice.id,'CANCEL_TRACE_ATOMIC',before,invoice,invoice.docNumber));
3453:     });
3454:     return invoice;
3455:   };
